text.en: 1. General Supplications
From Anas ibn Malik who said: When the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) intended to travel, he would say when departing:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَ بِكَ انْتَشَرْتُ وَ اِلَيْكَ تَوَجَّهْت
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma beka intasharto wa elayka tawajjahto

translation.en: O Allah! by Your Will (and Mercy) have I embarked on this journey, and to You have I turned,

segments.arabic: وَ بِكَ اعْتَصَمْتُ اَنْتَ ثِقَتِيْ وَ رَجَائِ
segments.transliteration: wa beka e-a’tasamto anta seqatee wa rajaaee.

translation.en: and with You do I seek refuge. You are my Confidant and my Hope.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اكْفِنِيْ مَا اَهَمَّنِي
segments.transliteration: allaahummak fenee maa ahammanee

translation.en: O Allah! Suffice for me that which is important for me

segments.arabic: وَ مَا لَا اَهْتَمَّ لَهٗ وَ مَا اَنْتَ اَعْلَمُ بِهٖ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa maa laa ahtamma lahu wa maa anta a-a’lamo behi minnee.

translation.en: and that which I do not give importance to but You know more of than me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ زَوِّدْنِي التَّقْوٰى وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma zawwidnit taqwaa wagh fir lee

translation.en: O Allah! Endow me with taqwa and forgive me,

segments.arabic: وَ وَجِّهْنِيْ اِلَى الْخَيْرِ حَيْثُمَا تَوَجَّهْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa wajjehnee elal khayre haysomaa tawajjahto.

translation.en: and turn me towards good wherever I turn.

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهٗ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho wahdahu laashareeka lahu

translation.en: There is no god but Allah. He is one – without any partner.

segments.arabic: لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَ هُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْر
segments.transliteration: lahul mulko wa lahul hamdo wa howa a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer

translation.en: His is the kingdom and for Him is all praise and He has power over all things.

segments.arabic: آئِبُوْنَ عَابِدُوْنَ سَاجِدُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: aaa-eboona a’abedoona saajedoona

translation.en: (We come to Him) returning, worshipping, prostrating

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا حَامِدُوْنَ صَدَقَ اللهُ وَعْدَهٗ
segments.transliteration: rabbanaa haamedoona sadaqal laaho wa’dahu

translation.en: and praising our Lord. Allah has made true His promise

segments.arabic: وَ نَصَرَ عَبْدَهٗ وَ هَزَمَ الْاَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa nasara a’bdahu wa hazamal ahzaaba wahdahu

translation.en: and helped His servant and vanquished the (enemy) factions.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ كَسَانِيْ مَا اُوَارِيْ بِهٖ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee kasaanee maa owaaree behi

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who clothed me with that which I conceal

segments.arabic: عَوْرَتِيْ وَ اَتَجَمَّلُ بِهٖ فِيْ النَّاسِ.
segments.transliteration: a’wratee wa atajammalo behi

translation.en: my nakedness with and by which I adorn myself amongst the people.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِسْمِكَ اَحْيَا وَ بِسْمِكَ اَمُوْتُ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma bismeka ahyaa wa bismeka amooto

translation.en: O Allah! By Your name do I live and by Your name do I die.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَحْيَانِيْ بَعْدَ مَا اَمَاتَنِيْ وَ اِلَيْهِ النُّشُوْرِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee ahyaanee ba’da maa amaatanee wa elayhin noshoor.

translation.en: All praise be to Allah who gave me life after causing me to die, and to Him is the return.

segments.arabic: سْمِ اللهِ. آمَنْتُ بِاللهِ وَ كَفَرْتُ بِالطَّاغُوْتِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laah. aamanto billaae wa kafarto bit-taaghoote.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, I believe in Allah and disbelieve in the false gods.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ احْفَظْنِيْ فِيْ مَنَامِيْ وَ فِيْ يَقْظَتِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahummah faznee fee manaamee wa fee yaqzatee

translation.en: O Allah protect me in my sleep and when I am awake.

segments.arabic: هُوَ اللهُ الَّذِيْ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: howal laahul lazee laa shareeka lahu.

translation.en: He is Allah – the one who has no partner.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ نُوْرُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahe noorus samaawaate wal arze

translation.en: All praise is due to Allah, the Light of the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ قَيُّوْمُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahe qayyoomus samaawaate wal arze

translation.en: and the Sustainer of the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahe rabbus samaawaate wal arze

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, the Lord of the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: وَ مَنْ فِيْهِنَّ اَنْتَ الْحَقُّ وَ قَوْلُكَ الْحَقُّ
segments.transliteration: wa man feehinna antal haqqo wa qawlokal haqqo

translation.en: and all therein. You are the Truth and Your words are true,

segments.arabic: وَ لِقَاؤُكَ الْحَقُّ وَ الْجَنَّةُ حَقٌّ
segments.transliteration: wa lekauka-lhaako wal jannato haqqun

translation.en: the return to You is true, Paradise is true,

segments.arabic: وَ النَّارُ حَقٌّ وَ السَّاعَةُ حَقّ
segments.transliteration: wan naaro haqqun was saa-a’to haqqun

translation.en: Hell is true and the Appointed Time is true.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ اَسْلَمْتُ وَ بِكَ آمَنْتُ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma laka aslamto wa beka aamanto

translation.en: O Allah! To You have I submitted and in You do I believe.

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَ اِلَيْكَ اُنِيْبُ
segments.transliteration: wa a’layka tawakkalto wa elayka oneebo

translation.en: In You do I put my trust and to You do I turn.

segments.arabic: وَ بِكَ خَاصَمْتُ وَ اِلَيْكَ حَاكَمْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa beka khaasamto wa elayka haakamto

translation.en: With Your strength do I fight my enemies and from You do I seek justice.

segments.arabic: فَاغْفِرْ لِيْ مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَ مَا اَخَّرْتُ
segments.transliteration: fagh-fir lee maa qaddamto wa maa akkharto

translation.en: Please forgive my sins, of past and present,

segments.arabic: وَ مَا اَسْرَرْتُ وَ مَا اَعْلَنْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa maa asrarto wa maa a-a’lanto.

translation.en: those I have done in hiding and those done openly.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اِلٰهِيْ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: anta elaahee laa elaaha illaa anta.

translation.en: You are my God – there is no god but You.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ. آمَنْتُ بِاللهِ وَ كَفَرْتُ بِالطَّاغُوْتِ.
segments.transliteration: bismil laah. aamanto billaahe wa kafarto bit-taaghoote.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, I believe in Allah and disbelieve in the false gods.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ احْفَظْنِيْ فِيْ مَنَامِيْ وَ فِيْ يَقْظَتِيْ.
segments.transliteration: allaahummah faznee fee manaamee wa fee yaqzatee.

translation.en: O Allah protect me in my sleep and when I am awake.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَلَدٍ يَكُوْن
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka min waladin yakoono

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You from an offspring who

segments.arabic: عَلَيَّ رَبًّا وَ مِنْ مَالٍ يَكُوْنُ
segments.transliteration: a’layya rabban wa min maalin yakoono

translation.en: would rule over me, and from the wealth that

segments.arabic: عَلَيَّ ضَيَاعًا وَ مِنْ زَوْجَةٍ
segments.transliteration: a’layya zayaa-a’n wa min zawjatin

translation.en: would be the cause of my destruction and from the wife

segments.arabic: تُشَيِّبَنِيْ قَبْلَ اَوَانَ مَشِيْبَتِيْ
segments.transliteration: toshayyebanee qabla awaana masheebatee.

translation.en: who would make me old before my time.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ لَمْ يَجْعَلْهُ اُجَاجًا بِذُنُوْبِنَا
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee lam yaj-a’lho ojaajan be-zonoobenaa

translation.en: All praise be to Allah, the One who did not make it (this water) bitter as a punishment for our sins,

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلَهٗ عَذْبًا فُرَاتًا بِنِعْمَت
segments.transliteration: wa ja-a’lahu a’zban foraatan be-ne’matehi.

translation.en: and made it sweet and quenching by His grace.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ اَطْعَمْتَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo at-a’mta

translation.en: O Allah! To You belongs all praise.

segments.arabic: وَ سَقَيْتَ وَ اَرْوَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa saqayta wa arwayta

translation.en: You have fed, given drink and quenched the thirst;;

segments.arabic: فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ غَيْرَ مَكْفُوْرٍ
segments.transliteration: falakal hamdo ghayra makfoorin

translation.en: so all praise belongs to you, without ingratitude,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُوَدَّعٍ وَ لَا مُسْتَغْنًى
segments.transliteration: wa laa mowadda-i’n wa laa mustaghnan .

translation.en: and without leave, and without (seeking) independence from You.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَطْعَمَ عَنْ
segments.transliteration: a’naal hamdo lillaahil lazee at-a’ma

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, the One Who gave food

segments.arabic: وَ سَقٰي وَ سَوَّغَهَ
segments.transliteration: wa saqaa wa sawwagha-ha

translation.en: and drink, and allowed it to be consumed,

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلَ لَهٗ مَخْرَجًا.
segments.transliteration: wa ja-a’la lahu makhrajan.

translation.en: and made a pathway and an outlet for it.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ عَلٰى مَا اَخْرَجَ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahe a’laa maa akhraja minnee

translation.en: All praise be to Allah for what he has removed from me

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْاَذٰى فِيْ يُسْرٍ وَ عَافِيَةٍ
segments.transliteration: menal azaa fee yusrin wa a’afeyatin.

translation.en: of that which is harmful (to my body) with ease and well-being.

segments.arabic: آجَرَكُمُ اللهُ وَ رَحِمَكُمْ.
segments.transliteration: aajarakomul laaho wa rahemakum.

translation.en: May Allah recompense you and have mercy on you.

segments.arabic: بَارَكَ اللهُ لَكُمْوَ بَارَكَ اللهُ عَلَيْكُمْ.
segments.transliteration: baarakal laaho lakum wa baarakal laaho a’laykum.

translation.en: May Allah bless you and keep you blessed.

segments.arabic: اَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ رَبَّ الْبَأْسِ ِ
segments.transliteration: azhebil baa-sa rabbal baa-se

translation.en: Remove the affliction O Lord of affliction,

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ الشَّافِيْ لَا شَافِيَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ .وَ اشْف
segments.transliteration: wash fe antash shaafee laa shaafeya illaa anta.

translation.en: and cure him for You are the Healer, there is no other Healer but You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مَتِّعْنِيْ بِسَمْعِيْ وَ بَصَرِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma mattea’nee be-sam-e’e wa basaree

translation.en: O Allah! Cause me to enjoy my hearing and my sight

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْهُمَا الْوَارِثَيْنِ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: waj a’lhomal waaresayne minnee

translation.en: and make them continue with me until the day I die,

segments.arabic: وَ انْصُرْنِيْ عَلٰى مَنْ ظَلَمَنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wan surnee a’laa man zalamanee

translation.en: and help me (to gain victory) over the one who oppresses me

segments.arabic: وَ اَرِنِيْ فِيْهِ ثَارِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa arenee feehe saaree.

translation.en: and take my vengeance from him.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الْكَبِيْراَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahil kabeere.a-o’ozo billaahil a’zeeme

translation.en: In the name of Allah the Great. I seek refuge with Allah the Almighty

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ حَرِّ النَّارِ.مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ عِرْقٍ نَعَّار
segments.transliteration: min sharre kulle i’rqin na’-a’arin wa min sharre harrin naare.

translation.en: from the evil of all that gushes in the veins and from the evil of the heat of the Hellfire.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ قَدْ فَعَلْتُ مَااَمَرْتَنَا فَاَنْجِزْ لَنَا
اَللّٰهُمَّ قَدْ فَعَلْتُ مَا اَمَرْتَنَا فَاَنْجِزْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma qad fa-a’lto maaa artanaa fa-anjiz lanaa

translation.en: O Allah! I have done as you commanded, so fulfill for us

segments.arabic: مَا وَعَدْتَنَا
segments.transliteration: maa wa-a’dtanaa

translation.en: what you have promised us.

segments.arabic: اِيْمَانًا وَ تَصْدِيْقًا بِبَعْثِكَ
segments.transliteration: eemaanan was tasdeeqan be-ba'seka

translation.en: (O Allah!) I believe and confirm that you will resurrect (all human beings);

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ اللهُ وَ رَسُولُهٗ وَ
segments.transliteration: haaza maa wa-a’dal laaho wa rasoolohu wa

translation.en: '... this is what Allah and his Prophet promised and

segments.arabic: مَا زَادَهُمْ اِلَّا اِيْمَانًا وَ تَسْلِيْمًا
segments.transliteration: maa zaadahum illaa eemaanan wa tasleeman.

translation.en: Allah and His promised spoke the truth – and it only increased them in faith and submission'.

segments.arabic: وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِيْ فَطَرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْاَرْضَ
segments.transliteration: wajaht wajhi liladhi fatar alsamawat w alaard

translation.en: I have turned myself wholly towards the One who originated the heavens and the earth

segments.arabic: حَنِيْفًا مُسْلِمًا وَ مَا اَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: hanifana muslimana w ma aana min almushrikina.

translation.en: and I am not from the polytheists.

segments.arabic: اِنَّ صَلَاتِيْ وَ نُسُكِيْ وَ مَحْيَايَ وَ مَمَاتِيْ
segments.transliteration: inna salati w nusuki w mahyay w mamati

translation.en: Verily my prayer and my sacrifice and my life and my death

segments.arabic: لِلهِ رَبِّ الْعالَمِيْنَ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَهٗ وَ بِذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: lilh rabi alealamin la sharik lah w bidhlik

translation.en: are for Allah, the Lord of the Universe – He has no partner; and this is what

segments.arabic: اُمِرْتُ وَ اَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: aumirt w aana min almuslimina. aalllhuma ajealni

translation.en: I was commanded and I am from those who submit. O Allah! Place me

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ. اَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ السَّمِيْعِ
segments.transliteration: min almuslimina. aaeudh biallh alsmie

translation.en: among those who submit. I seek refuge with Allah

segments.arabic: الْعَلِيْمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيْمِ.
segments.transliteration: alealim min alshaytan alrajimi.

translation.en: from the accursed Shaytan.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ.
segments.transliteration: bism allh alrahmn alrahimi.

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the All-beneficent the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللهُ اَكْبَرُ اَللهُ اَكْبَرُ اَللهُ اَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: aallh aakbar aallh aakbar aallh aakbar

translation.en: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest

segments.arabic: عَلٰىمَا هَدَانَا اَللهُ اَكْبَرُ عَلٰى مَا رَزَقَنَا
segments.transliteration: eala ma hadana aallh aakbar eala ma razaqana

translation.en: for that which He has guided us to. Allah is the Greatest for what He has granted us of sustenance

segments.arabic: بَهِيْمَةِ الْاَنْعَامِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلهِ عَلٰى مَا اَبْلَانَا.مِنْ
segments.transliteration: min bahimat alaaneam w alhamd lilh eala ma aablana.

translation.en: from the livestock, and all praise is due to Allah for what He has destined for us.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اسْقِ عِبَادَكَ وَ بَهَائِمَكَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma asq eibadak w bahayimak

translation.en: O Allah! Give water to Your servants and Your creatures,

segments.arabic: وَانْشُرْ رَحْمَتَكَ وَ اَحْيِ بِلَادَكَ الْمَيْتَةَ.
segments.transliteration: wanshur rahmatak w aahy biladak almaytata.

translation.en: and spread Your mercy, and give life to Your lifeless land.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ سَجَدْتُ وَ بِكَ آمَنْتُ وَ لَكَ اَسْلَمْتُ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma lak sajadt w bik amant w lak aaslamt

translation.en: O Allah! I have prostrated before You, and believed in You and submitted myself to You.

segments.arabic: سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِيْ خَلَقَهٗ وَ صَوَّرَهٗ وَ شَقَّ
segments.transliteration: sajad wajhi liladhi khalaqah w sawarah w shaqa

translation.en: My face has prostrated to the One who created it and fashioned it, giving it (the power of)

segments.arabic: سَمْعَهٗ وَ بَصَرَهٗ فَتَبَارَكَ اللهُ اَحْسَنُ الْخالِقِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: sameah w basarah fatabarak allh aahsan alkhaliqina.

translation.en: hearing and sight; so blessed is Allah the best of Creators.

segments.arabic: سَمِعَ اللهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهٗ اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ مِلْءَ
segments.transliteration: samie allh liman hamidah aalllhuma lak alhamd mil '

translation.en: Allah listens to the one who glorifies Him. O Allah! Glory be to You, (a glory that is) filling

segments.arabic: سَمَاوَاتِكَ وَ مِلْءَ اَرْضِكَ وَ مِلْءَ مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ.
segments.transliteration: samawatik wa mil ' aardik wa mil ' ma shit min shay 'in.

translation.en: Your heavens and filling Your earth and filling up whatever You wish.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِيْ وَ ارْحَمْنِيْ وَ اَجِرْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma aghfir liy w arhamniy w aajirniy

translation.en: O Allah! Forgive me, and have mercy on me, and keep me safe

segments.arabic: وَعَافِنِيْ اِنِّيْ لِمَا اَنْزَلْتَ اِلَيَّخَيْرٍ فَقِيْر
segments.transliteration: waeafiniy ainiy lima aanzalt ailaya khayr faqiyrun.

translation.en: and grant me well-being. I am needy of the good that You have sent down to me.

segments.arabic: تَبَارَكَ اللهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: tabarak allh rabu alealamina .

translation.en: Blessed is Allah, the Lord of the Universe.

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْاِكْرَامِ
segments.transliteration: ya hayu ya qayuwm ya dha aljalal w alaikram

translation.en: O Ever-Living! O Self-Subsisting! O Lord of Might and Majesty!

segments.arabic: يَا رَحْمٰنَ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ وَ رَحِيْمَهُمَا
segments.transliteration: ya rahmn aldunya w alakhirat w rahimahuma

translation.en: O Merciful in this world and hereafter and Compassionate in them both!

segments.arabic: يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ يَا اِلٰهَ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ اِغْفِرْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: alraahimin ya ailh alaawalin w alakhirin aighfir lana

translation.en: O Most Merciful of mercifuls! O Master of the first ones and the last ones! Forgive us

segments.arabic: ذُنُوْبَنَا وَ تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا صَلَاتَنَا وَ صِيَامَنَا وَ قِيَامَنَا.
segments.transliteration: dhunubana w taqabal minaa salatana w siamana w qiamana .

translation.en: our sins and accept from us our prayers and fasting and good deeds.

text.en: Second: 2. His Dua When He Looked In The Mirror

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَكْمَلَ خَلْقِيْ وَ اَحْسَنَ
segments.transliteration: aalhamd lilh aladhi aakmal khalqi w aahsan

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who created me perfectly, and made handsome

segments.arabic: صُوْرَتِيْ وَ زَانَ مِنِّيْ مَا شَانَ مِنْ غَيْرِيْ
segments.transliteration: surati w zan miniy ma shan min ghayri

translation.en: my face, and made graceful from me what he made disgraceful from others,

segments.arabic: وَ هَدَانِيْ لِلْاِسْلَامِ وَ مُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِالنُّبُوَّةِ.
segments.transliteration: w hadani lilaislam w muna ealaya bialnubuati.

translation.en: and guided me to Islam, and blessed me with prophethood.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَحْسَنَ خَلْقِيْ وخُلْقِيْ َ
segments.transliteration: aalhamd lilh aladhi aahsan khalqi w khulqi

translation.en: Praise be to Allah Who made excellent my creation and my character,

segments.arabic: وَ زَانَ مِنِّيْ مَا شَانَ مِنْ غَيْرِيْ.
segments.transliteration: w zan miniy ma shan min ghayri.

translation.en: and made graceful from me what he made disgraceful from others.

text.en: Third: P3. His Dua When Sitting On His Mount

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَالَّذِيْ سَخَّرَ لَنَا هٰذَا وَ مَا كُنَّا لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: subhan aladhi sakhar lana hdha w ma kunaa lahu

translation.en: Glory be to Allah who has made this (animal) subservient to us and we would not be able to do it (ourselves)

segments.arabic: مُقْرِنِيْنَ وَ اِنَّا اِلٰى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: muqrinin w ainaa aila rabina lamunqalibuna.

translation.en: and surely to our Lord will we return.

segments.arabic: نَسْاَلُكَ فِيْ سَفَرِنَا هٰذَا الْبِرَّ وَ التَّقْوٰى اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّا
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma ainaa nasaaluk fi safarina hdha albira w altaqwa

translation.en: We ask that this journey be accompanied with goodness and piety

segments.arabic: وَ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضٰى. اَللّٰهُمَّ هَوِّنْ
segments.transliteration: w min aleamal ma tarda. aalllhuma hawin

translation.en: and with actions that please You. O Allah! Make this journey easy

segments.arabic: عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا هٰذَا وَ اَطْوِ عَنَّا بُعْدَهٗ.
segments.transliteration: a’laynaa safaranaa haazaa wa atwe a’nnaa bo’adahuU

translation.en: for us and let us cover its distance quickly.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَنْتَ الصَّاحِبُ فِي السَّفَرِ َ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma aant alsaahib fi alsafar

translation.en: O Allah! You are the Companion in the journey

segments.arabic: الْخَلِيْفَةُ فِي الْاَهْلِ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ و
segments.transliteration: w alkhalifat fi alaahli. aalllhuma ainiy aaeudh bik

translation.en: and the Guardian over the family. O Allah! I seek refuge with You

segments.arabic: مِنْ وَعْثَاءِ السَّفَرِ وَ كَـآبَةِ الْمُنْقَلَبِ
segments.transliteration: min waetha' alsafar w kaabat almunqalab

translation.en: from the difficulties of the journey and from the melancholy of being in a different place

segments.arabic: سُوْءِ الْمَنْظَرِ فِيْ الْاَهْلِ وَ الْمَالِ.وَ
segments.transliteration: w su' almanzar fi alaahl w almali.

translation.en: and from witnessing anything bad in the family and wealth.

segments.arabic: آئِبُوْنَ تَائِبُوْنَ عَابِدُوْنَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُوْنَ.
segments.transliteration: aaa-eboona taa-eboona a’abedoona le-rabbenaa haamedoona.

translation.en: We return (home while) repenting, worshipping and praising our Lord.

text.en: Fourth: 4. His Dua In The Night While Travelling

segments.arabic: يَا اَرْضُ رَبِّيْ وَ رَبُّكِ اللهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya aard rabiy w rabuk allhu.

translation.en: O Earth! My Lord and your Lord is Allah.

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ مِنْ شَرِّكِ وَ شَرِّ مَا فِيْكِ
segments.transliteration: w aaeudh min sharik w shari ma fik

translation.en: I seek refuge from your evil and the evil of what is (living) on you

segments.arabic: وَ شَرِّ مَا يَدُبُّ عَلَيْكِ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ
segments.transliteration: w shari ma yadubu ealayk w aaeudh biallh

translation.en: and the evil of what walks upon you. And I seek refuge with Allah

segments.arabic: مِنْ اَسَدٍ وَ اَسْوَدٍ وَ مِنَ الْحَيَّةِ وَ الْعَقْرَبٍ
segments.transliteration: min aasad w aaswad w min alhayat w aleaqrab

translation.en: from every lurking predator and from the snake and the scorpion

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ سَاكِنِ الْبَلَدِ وَ وَالِدٍ وَ مَا وَلَدَ.
segments.transliteration: w min sakin albalad w walid w ma walada.

translation.en: and from the inhabitants of the place – from them and their young.

text.en: Fifth: 5. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Wore New Clothes

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ كَسَانِيْ مَا يُوَارِيْ عَوْرَتِيْ وَ اَتَجَمَّلُ بِهٖ فِيْ النَّاسِ.
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee kasaanee maa yowaaree a’wratee wa atajammalo behi fin naase.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who clothed me with what covers my nakedness and with what I adorn myself among the people.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِكَ اسْتَتَرْتُ وَ اِلَيْكَ تَوَجَّهْتُ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma bik astatart w ailayk tawajaht

translation.en: O Allah! By You have I covered myself and to You have I turned

segments.arabic: وَ بِكَ اعْتَصَمْتُ وَ عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْتُ.
segments.transliteration: w bik aetasamt w ealayk tawakaltu.

translation.en: and with You have I sought protection and upon You have I put my trust.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَنْتَ ثِقَتِيْ وَ اَنْتَ رَجَائِيْ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اكْفِنِيْ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma aant thiqati w aant rajayiy. aalllhuma akfini

translation.en: O Allah! You are my Reliance and You are my Hope. O Allah! Suffice for

segments.arabic: مَا اَهَمَّنِيْ وَ مَا لَا اَهْتَمُّ بِهٖ وَ مَا اَنْتَ اَعْلَمُ بِهٖ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: ma aahamani w ma la aahtamu bih w ma aant aaelam bih miniy

translation.en: me that which concerns me and that which I do not give importance to and what You know more about than me.

segments.arabic: عَزَّ جَارُكَ وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَ لَا اِلٰهَ غَيْرُكَ.
segments.transliteration: eaza jaruk w jala thanawuk w la ailh ghayruka.

translation.en: Revered is the one who is close to You, exalted is Your Glory and there is no god other than You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ زَوِّدْنِيْ التَّقْوٰى وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma zawidni altaqwa w aghfir li

translation.en: O Allah! Grant me the provisions of taqwa and forgive

segments.arabic: ذَنْبِيْ وَ وَجِّهْنِيْ لِلْخَيْرِ حَيْثُ مَا تَوَجَّهْتُ.
segments.transliteration: dhanbi w wajihni lilkhayr hayth ma tawajahtu.

translation.en: my sin and turn me towards good wherever I turn.

text.en: Sixth: 6. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Stood Up From Where He (s.a.w.a.) Was Sitting :

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ بِحَمْدِكَ اَشْهَدُ اَنْ لَ
segments.transliteration: subhanak allahumma w bihamdik aashad aan l

translation.en: Praise be to You O Allah! And by Your Glory! I Bear witness that there is no

segments.arabic: ا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَ اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ail ailaa aant aastaghfiruk w aatub ailayk

translation.en: god but You. I seek repentance from You and I turn to You.

text.en: Seventh: 7. His Dua When Entering And Leaving The Masjid

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِيْ اَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaf tah lee abwaaba rahmateka.

translation.en: O Allah! Open for me the doors of Your Mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِيْ اَبْوَابَ رِزْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaf tah lee abwaaba rizqeka.

translation.en: O Allah! Open for me the doors of Your Sustenance.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِاَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: bism allhi. allahumma sali ealy muhamad w al muhamad w

translation.en: In the name of Allah. O Allah! Bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: اغْفِرْ لِيْ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَافْتَحْ لِيْ اَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ.وَ
segments.transliteration: aghfir liy dhunubiy waftah liy aabwab rahmatika.

translation.en: and forgive my sins and open for me the doors of Your Mercy.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِاَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe. allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin

translation.en: In the name of Allah. O Allah! Bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ ذُنُوْبِيْ وَافْتَحْ لِيْ اَبْوَابَ فَضْلِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wagh fir lee zonoobee waf tah lee abwaaba fazleka.

translation.en: and forgive my sins and open for me the doors of Your Grace.

text.en: Eighth: 8. his dua when he (s.a.w.a.) retired to his bed

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ قِنِيْ عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma qenee a’zaabaka yawma tab-a’so e’baadaka.

translation.en: O Allah! Keep me safe from Your Wrath on the day when You resurrect Your servants.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ اَمُوْتُ وَ اَحْيَا وَ اِلَي اللهِ الْمَصِيْرُ.
segments.transliteration: bism allh aamut w aahya w ailay allh almasiru.

translation.en: In the name of Allah do I die and live and to Allah is the return.

segments.arabic: رَوْعَتِيْ وَ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَتِيْ وَاَدِّ عَنِّيْ اَمَانَتِيْ.اَللّٰهُمَّ آمِنْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma amin raweatiy w astur eawratiy waadi eaniy aamanatiy.

translation.en: O Allah! Dispel my fears and hide my faults and (help me to) return what has been entrusted to me.

text.en: Ninth: 9. His Dua When The Table-Spread Is Laid Out

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اَللّٰهُمَّ مَا اَحْسَنَ مَا تَبْتَلِيْنَا سُبْحَانَكَ
segments.transliteration: subhanak aalllhuma ma aahsan ma tabtalina subhanak

translation.en: Glory be to You O Allah! How wonderful is that which You have tested us with. Glory be to You,

segments.arabic: اَكْثَرَ مَا تُعْطِيْنَا سُبْحَانَكَ مَا اَكْثَرَ .مَا
segments.transliteration: ma aakthar ma tuetina subhanak ma aakthar

translation.en: how plentiful is that which You have given us. Glory be to You, how plentiful

segments.arabic: مَاتُعَافِيْنَا. اَللّٰهُمَّ اَوْسِعْ عَلَيْنَا وَ عَلٰى فُقَرَاءِ
segments.transliteration: ma tueafina. aalllhuma aawsie ealayna w eala fuqara'

translation.en: is that which You have bestowed on us. O Allah! Increase for us (our sustenance) and for the poor

segments.arabic: الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ وَ الْمُسْلِمَاتِ.وَ
segments.transliteration: w almuminin w almuminat w almuslimin w almuslimati.

translation.en: believing men and women and (for the poor) Muslim men and women.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْهَا نِعْمَۃً
segments.transliteration: bism allhi. aalllhuma ajealha niemaan

translation.en: In the name of Allah. O Allah! Make it an appreciated blessing

segments.arabic: مَشْكُوْرَۃً تَصِلُ بِهَا نِعْمَۃَ الْجَنَّۃِ.
segments.transliteration: mashkurahan tasil biha niemah aljanahi.

translation.en: by means of which the bounties of paradise are attained.

text.en: Tenth:.10. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Touched The Food

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيْمَا
segments.transliteration: bism allh barik lana fima

translation.en: In the name of Allah, (O Allah!) Bless for us from what you have given us

segments.arabic: رَزَقْتَنَا وَ عَليْكَ خَلْفَهٗ.
segments.transliteration: razaqtana w ealyk khalfah.

translation.en: of sustenance and upon You do we rely for its replenishment.

text.en: Eleventh: His Dua When The Table-Spread Was Picked Up

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَكْثَرْتَ وَ اَطَبْتَ وَ بَارَكْتَ فَاَشْبَعْتَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma aakthart w aatabt w barakt faashbaet

translation.en: O Allah! You have increased Your bounties and made them good and blessed, thereby making us satiated

segments.arabic: وَ اَرْوَيْتَ. اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِي يُطْعِمُ وَ لَا يُطْعَمُ
segments.transliteration: w aarwayta. aalhamd lilh aladhi yuteim w la yuteam

translation.en: and quenched. All praise be to Allah, the One Who nourishes and is not nourished.

text.en: Twelfth 12. His Dua When Eating And Drinking Milk

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيْهِ وَ اَبْدِلْنَا بِهٖ خَيْرًا مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma barik lana fih w aabdilna bih khayrana min

translation.en: O Allah! Bless it for us and replenish it with that which is better.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّاَللّٰهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيْهِ وَ زِدْنَا مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma baarik lanaa feehe wa zidnaa minho

translation.en: O Allah! Bless it for us and increase it for us.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ اَطْعَمْتَ وَ اَسْقَيْتَ وَ رَوَيْتَ. فَلَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma lak alhamd aateamt w aasqayt w rawayta. falak

translation.en: O Allah! Praise be to You. You have nourished and quenched and satisfied (us), so to You be

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ غَيْرُ مَكْفُوْرٍ وَ لَا مُوَدَّعٍ وَ لَا مُسْتَغْنٰي عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: alhamd ghayr makfur w la muadae w la mustaghny eank

translation.en: praise – praise without ingratitude and without leave and without (seeking) independence from You.

text.en: Thirteenth: 13. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Saw Fresh Fruit.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ كَمَا اَرَيْتَنَا اَوَّلَهَا فِيْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma kama aaraytana aawalaa fiy

translation.en: O Allah! Just as You have shown us its beginning in

segments.arabic: عَافِيَۃٍ فَاَرِنَا آخِرَهَا فِيْ عَافِيَۃٍ
segments.transliteration: eafiyah faarina akhiraa fiy eafiyah

translation.en: well-being, show us its end in well-being.

text.en: Fourteenth: 14. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Entered The Washroom. `

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ الرِّجْسِ النَّجِسِ الْخَبِيْثِ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma ainiy aaeudh bik min alrijs alnajis alkhabith

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You from the filth of the impurity of the evil

segments.arabic: الْمُخْبَثِ الشَّيْطَانِ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اَمْطِ عَنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: almukhbath alshaytani. aalllhuma aamt eaniy

translation.en: of the reviled Shaitan. O Allah! Pull away from me

segments.arabic: الْاَذٰى وَ اَعِذْنِيْ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: alaadha w aaeidhni min alshaytan alrajim

translation.en: all uncleanliness and protect me from the accursed Shaitan.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَذْهِبْ عَنِّيْ الْقَذٰى وَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma aadhhib eaniy alqadha w

translation.en: O Allah! Remove from me the filth and

segments.arabic: اَذٰى وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: aadha w ajealni min almutatahirina

translation.en: impurity and make me from among the ones who purify themselves.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ كَمَا اَطْعَمْتَنِيْهِ طَيِّبًا فِيْ عَافِيَةٍ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma kama aateamtanih tayibana fi eafia

translation.en: O Allah! Just as You have fed me with its goodness in well-being,

segments.arabic: فَاَخْرِجْهُ مِنِّيْ خَبِيْثًا فِيْ عَافِيَةٍ.
segments.transliteration: faakhrijh miniy khabithana fi eafiatin

translation.en: then take its filth out of me in well-being.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الْحَافِظِ الْمُؤَدِّيْ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil haafezil mo-addee.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah, the Protector and the Fulfiller (of needs).

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَخْرَجَ عَنِّيْ اَذَاهُ وَ اَبْقٰى
segments.transliteration: aalhamd lilh aladhi aakhraj eaniy aadhah w aabqa

translation.en: Praise be to Allah, the One Who removed from me its filth and left

segments.arabic: فِيَّ قُوَّتَهٗ فَيَا لَهَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ لَا يُقَدِّرُ الْقَادِرُوْنَ قَدْرَهَا.
segments.transliteration: fia quatah faya laha min niemat la yuqad alqadirun qadraha.

translation.en: in me its strength. What a (great) blessing it is – the real value of which cannot be fully appreciated by anyone.

text.en: Fifteenth: 15. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Passed By The Graves.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ مِنْ دِيَارِ قَوْمٍ مُؤْمِنِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: aalsalam ealaykum min diar qawm muminin

translation.en: Peace be unto you from the dwellings of the community of believers

segments.arabic: وَ اِنَّا اِنْ شَاءَ اللهُ بِكُمْ لَاحِقُوْنَ.
segments.transliteration: w ainaa ain sha' allh bikum lahiquna.

translation.en: and we shall – if Allah wills – be joining you.

text.en: Sixteenth: 16. His Dua When Visiting The Graves

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا اَهْلَ الدِّيَاررَحِمَكُمُ اللهُ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laykum yaa ahlad deyaar rahemakomul laah..

translation.en: Peace be unto you O people of the dwellings! May Allah have mercy on you.

text.en: Seventeenth: 17. his dua in the event of something pleasing or distressing coming upon him

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ عَلٰي هٰذِهِ النِّعْمَۃِ.
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahe a’laa haazehin ne’mate.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah for this blessing.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ عَلٰي كُلِّ حَالٍ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahe a’laa kulle haal.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah in every situation.

text.en: Eighteenth: 18. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Saw What He (s.a.w.a.) Liked

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ بِنِعْمَتِهٖ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee be-ne’matehi tatimmus saalehaat.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah, the One Who completes (and perfects) all that is good with His bounty.

text.en: Nineteenth: 19. His Zikr When He (s.a.w.a.) Heard The Azan

segments.arabic: حَيَّ عَلَي الصَّلَاةِ حَيَّ عَلَي الْفَلَاحِ حَيَّ عَلٰي خَيْرِ الْعَمَلِ
segments.transliteration: hayya a’las salaate hayya a’lal falaahe hayya a’laa khayril a’male

translation.en: Hurry to the prayer. Hurry to success. Hurry to the best of actions

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ.
segments.transliteration: laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahe.

translation.en: There is no power and no might but by (the will of) Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ وَ الصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ اَعْطِ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma raba hdhih aldaewat altaamat w alsalat alqayimat aaet

translation.en: O Allah! Lord of this perfect call and established prayer, grant

segments.arabic: مُحَمَّدًا سُؤْلَهٗ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَ بَلِّغْهُ الدَّرَ
segments.transliteration: muhamadana sulah yawm alqiamat w balighh aldar

translation.en: Muhammad his request on the Day of Judgment, and raise his status

segments.arabic: جَةَ الْوَسِيْلَةَ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ وَ تَقَبَّلْ شَفَاعَتَهٗ فِيْ اُمَّتِهٖ.
segments.transliteration: jat alwasilat min aljanat w taqabal shafaeatah fi aumatih.

translation.en: to the means of reaching paradise and accept his intercession for his Ummah.

text.en: 20. His Zikr At The End Of The Maghrib Prayer

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوْبَنَا بَعْدَ اِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ
segments.transliteration: rabana la tuzigh qulubana baed aidh adaytana wHab

translation.en: Our Lord! Make not our hearts deviate after You have guided us aright and

segments.arabic: لَنَا مِنْ لَّدُنْكَ رَحْمَۃً اِنَّكَ اَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
segments.transliteration: lana ladunk rahmaanO ainak aant alwaHaab

translation.en: bestow Your mercy on us, indeed You are the All-Munificent.

text.en: Twenty-first: 21. His Zikr And Dua In The Qunut Of The Watr Prayer

segments.arabic: هٰذَا مَقَامُ الْعَائِذِ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ.
segments.transliteration: haazaa maqaamul a’a-eze beka menan naar.

translation.en: This is the position of the seeker of protection with You from the hellfire

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اهْدِنِيْ فِيْمَنْ هَدَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma ahdini fiman hadayt

translation.en: O Allah! Guide me as those whom You have guided,

segments.arabic: وَ عَافِنِيْ فِيْمَنْ عَافَيْتَ وَ تَوَلَّنِيْ فِيْمَنْ
segments.transliteration: w eafini fiman eafayt w tawalani fiman

translation.en: and grant me well-being as those whom You have granted well-being, and take care of my affair

segments.arabic: تَوَلَّيْتَ وَ بَارِكْ لِيْ فِيْمَا اَعْطَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: tawalayt w barik li fima aaetayt

translation.en: as those whose affairs You have taken care of and bless me in what You grant me

segments.arabic: وَ قِنِيْ شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ اِنَّكَ
segments.transliteration: w qini shara ma qadayt ainak

translation.en: and protect me from the evil of what You have decreed, verily You

segments.arabic: تَقْضِيْ وَ لَا يُقْضٰى عَلَيْكَ سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّ الْبَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: taqdi w la yuqda ealayk subhanak raba albayt

translation.en: decree and nothing is decreed upon You. Glory be to You O Lord of the House!

segments.arabic: اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَ اَتُوْبُ اِلَيْكَ وَ اُوْمِنُ بِكَ وَ اَتَوَكَّلُ
segments.transliteration: aastaghfiruk w aatub ailayk w aumin bik w aatawakal

translation.en: seek forgiveness from You and turn to You, and I seek refuge with You and rely

segments.arabic: عَلَيْكَ وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِكَ يَا رَحِيْمُ.
segments.transliteration: ealayk w la hawl w la quat ailaa bik ya rahimu.

translation.en: on You, and there is no power or might but by Your will, O Most Merciful!

text.en: Twenty-second: 22. His Dua When Opening The Fast

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْنَا وَ عَلٰى رِزْقِكَ اَفْطَرْنَا فَتَقَبَّلْهُ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma lak sumna w eala rizqik aaftarna fataqabalh

translation.en: O Allah! For You have we fasted and with Your sustenance have we opened our fast, so accept it

segments.arabic: مِنَّا. ذَهَبَ الظَّمَاُ وَ ابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَ بَقِيَ الْاَجْرُ.
segments.transliteration: minaa. dhahab alzama w abtalat aleuruq w baqi alaajru.

translation.en: from us. The thirst has gone and the canals have become full and (only) the reward (for fasting) remains.

text.en: Twenty-third: 23. His Dua After The Prayer

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوَ عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ ِ
segments.transliteration: bismillah aladhi la ail ailaa u ealim alghayb

translation.en: In the name of Allah, there is no god but He, the Knower of the unseen

segments.arabic: الرَّحْمٰنُ الرَّحِيْمُ ٍ.وَ الشَّهَادَۃ
segments.transliteration: w alshaada alrahmn alrahiym

translation.en: and the seen, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اَذْهِبْ عَنِّيْ الْهَمَّ وَ الْحُزْنَ.صَلِّ عَلٰي مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: sali ealy muhamad w al muhamad w aadhib eaniy alama w alhuzna.

translation.en: O Allah! Send You blessings on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad and take away from me all distress and sorrow.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِيْ مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَ مَا اَخَّرْتُ وَ مَا اَسْرَرْتُ وَ مَا اَعْلَنْتُ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma aghfir li ma qadamt w ma aakhart w ma aasrart w ma aaelant

translation.en: O Allah! Forgive me for my actions of the past and future, those done in secret and in the open;

segments.arabic: وَ اِسْرَافِيْ عَلٰى اَمْرِيْ (نَفْسِيْ) وَ مَا اَنْتَ اَعْلَمُ بِهٖ مِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: w aisrafi eala aamri (nafsi) w ma aant aaelam bih miniy.

translation.en: and my extravagance in my affairs and that which You are more aware of than me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ وَالْمُؤَخِّرُ لَا اِلٰهَ إِلَّا اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma aant almuqadim walmuakhir la ailh 'iilaa aant

translation.en: O Allah! You are the Beginning and the End, there is no god but You;

segments.arabic: بِعِلْمِكَ الْغَيْبَ وَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ اَجْمَعِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: bieilmik alghayb w biqudratik ealaa alkhalq aajmaein

translation.en: by Your Knowledge of the unseen and by Your Power over all the creatures,

segments.arabic: مَا عَلِمْتَ الْحَيَاةَ خَيْرًا لِيْ فَاَحْيِنِيْ وَ
segments.transliteration: ma ealimt alhayat khayrana li faahyini w

translation.en: if You know that life is better for me then make me live

segments.arabic: تَوَفَّنِيْ اِذَا عَلِمْتَ الْوَفَاةَ خَيْرًا لِيْ
segments.transliteration: tawafani aidha ealimt alwafat khayrana li

translation.en: and if death is better for me cause me to die.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ خَشْيَتَكَ فِي السِّرِّ وَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma ainiy aasaaluk khashyatak fi alsiri w

translation.en: O Allah! I ask for the ability to fear You in private

segments.arabic: الْعَلَانِيَةِ وَ كَلِمَةَ الْحَقِّ فِي الْغَضَبِ
segments.transliteration: alealaniat w kalimat alhaqi fi alghadab

translation.en: and in public, and to speak the truth in anger

segments.arabic: وَ الرِّضَا وَ الْقَصْدَ فِي الْفَقْرِ والْغِنٰىَ
segments.transliteration: w alrida w alqasd fi alfaqr walghina.

translation.en: and happiness and to be moderate in poverty and wealth;

segments.arabic: . وَ اَسْاَلُكَ نَعِيْمًا لَا يَنْفَدُ وَ قُرَّةَ عَيْنٍ لَا
segments.transliteration: w aasaaluk naeimana la yanfad w qurat eayn la

translation.en: and I ask You for blessings that do not get diminished and light of my eyes that does not

segments.arabic: يَنْقَطِعُ. وَ اَسْاَلُكَ الرِّضَا بِالْقَضَاءِ وَ بَرَكَةَ الْمَوْتِ بَعْدَ الْعَيْشِ
segments.transliteration: yanqatieu. w aasaaluk alrida bialqada' w barakat almawt baed aleaysh

translation.en: cease; and I ask You to make me pleased with what has been decreed and grant me the blessing of death after life

segments.arabic: وَ بَرْدَ الْعَيْشِ بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ وَ لَذَّةَ النَّظَرِ
segments.transliteration: w bard aleaysh baed almawt w ladhat alnazar

translation.en: and the ease of life after death and the delight of witnessing Your presence

segments.arabic: اِلٰى وَجْهِكَ وَ شَوْقًا اِلٰى رُؤْيَتِكَ وَ لِقَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: aila wajhik w shaw wfqana aila ruyatik w liqayik

translation.en: and the longing for seeing You and meeting You,

segments.arabic: مِنْ غَيْرِ ضَرَّاءَ مُضِرَّةٍ وَ لَا فِتْنَةٍ مَضِلَّةٍ. اَللّٰهُمَّ زَيِّنَّا بِزِيْنَةِ الْاِيْمَانِ
segments.transliteration: min ghayr daraa' mudirat w la fitnat madilatin. aalllhuma zayinaa bizinat alaiman

translation.en: without any difficult trials and misguiding temptations. O Allah! Adorn us with the embellishment of faith

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنَا هُدَاةً مَهْدِيِّيْنَ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اهْدِنَا فِيْمَنْ هَدَيْتَ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ عَزِيْمَةَ الرَّشَادِ
segments.transliteration: w ajealna hudatan mahdiiyna. aalllhuma ahdina fiman hadayta. aalllhuma ainiy aasaaluk eazimat alrashad

translation.en: and make us rightly guided guides. O Allah! Guide us as those whom You have guided. O Allah! I ask You for the will to follow the right way

segments.arabic: وَ الثَّبَاتَ فِي الْاَمْرِ وَ الرُّشْدِ. وَ اَسْاَلُكَ شُكْرَ نِعَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: w althabat fi alaamr w alrushdi. w aasaaluk shukr nieamik

translation.en: and remain steadfast and I ask You to help me give thanks for Your bounties

segments.arabic: وَ حُسْنَ عَافِيَتِكَ وَ اَدَاءَ حَقِّكَ. وَ اَسْاَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: w husn eafiatik w aada' haqika. w aasaaluk

translation.en: and the good health You have given me and to fulfill my obligations to You. And I ask You,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ قَلْبًا سَلِيْمًا وَ لِسَانًا صَادِقًا وَ اَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا
segments.transliteration: ya rabi qalbana salimana w lisanana sad wfqana w aastaghfiruk lima

translation.en: O Lord, for an untainted heart and a truthful tongue and I seek forgiveness for what

segments.arabic: تَعْلَمُ وَ اَسْاَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا تَعْلَمُ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ
segments.transliteration: taelam w aasaaluk khayr ma taelam w aaeudh bik min

translation.en: You know (of my faults), and I ask You for the best of what You know (to be good for me); and I seek refuge with You from

segments.arabic: شَرِّ مَا تَعْلَمُ فَاِنَّكَ تَعْلَمُ وَ لَا نَعْلَمُ وَ اَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوْبِ.
segments.transliteration: shari ma taelam fainak taelam w la naelam w aant ealaam alghuyubi.

translation.en: the evil of what You know, for surely You know and we do not know and You are the Knower of the unseen.

text.en: Twenty-fourth: 24. His Dua After The Naafelah Of The Fajr Prayer

segments.arabic: اِسْتَمْسَكْتُ بِعُرْوَةِ اللهِ الْوُثْقٰى الَّتِيْ لَا انْفِصَامَ
segments.transliteration: aistamsakt bieurwat allh alwuthqa alati la anfisam

translation.en: I have laid hold of the firmest handle of Allah which shall not break off

segments.arabic: لَهَا وَ اسْتَعْصَمْتُ بِحَبْلِ اللهِ الْمَتِيْنِ.
segments.transliteration: laha w astaesamt bihabl allh almatini.

translation.en: and I have clung to the strong rope of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ مِنْ فَوْرَةِ الْعَرَبِ وَ الْعَجَمِ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ مِنْ
segments.transliteration: aaeudh biallh min fawrat alearab w aleajam w aaeudh biallh min min

translation.en: I seek refuge with Allah from the outbursts of the Arab and the non-Arab, and I seek refuge with Allah from

segments.arabic: شَرِّ شَيَاطِيْنِ الْاِنْسِ وَ الْجِنِّ. تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ طَلَبْتُ
segments.transliteration: shari shayatin alains w aljini. tawakalt ealaa allh talabt

translation.en: the evil of the devils from the man and jinn. I trust in Allah. I seek

segments.arabic: حَاجَتِيْ مِنَ اللهِ حَسْبِيَ اللهُ وَ نِعْمَ الْوَكِيْلُ
segments.transliteration: hajati min allh hasbi allh w niem alwakil

translation.en: the fulfillment of my needs from Allah. Allah is enough for me and He is the best Procurator,

segments.arabic: َا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ.
segments.transliteration: a hawl w la quat ailaa biallh alealii aleazimi.

translation.en: the fulfillment of my needs from Allah. Allah is enough for me and He is the best Procurator,

text.en: Twenty-fifth: 25. His Dua After The Fajr Prayer

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ لِيْ دِيْنِيَ الَّذِيْ جَعَلْتَهٗ لِيْ عِصْمَةً.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh lee deeneyal lazee ja-a’ltahu lee i’smatan.

translation.en: O Allah! Set right for me the religion that You have made a safeguard for me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ لِي دُنْيَايَ الَّتِيْ جَعَلْتَ فِيْهَا مَعَاشِيْ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh lee dunyaayal latee ja-a’lta feehaa ma-a’ashee.

translation.en: O Allah! Set right for me this world that You have made me live in.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ لِيْ آخِرَتِيَ الَّتِيْ جَعَلْتَ اِلَيْهَا مَرْجَعِيْ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh lee aakherateyal latee ja-a’lta elayhaa marja-e’e.

translation.en: O Allah! Set right for me my hereafter that you have made my place of return.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ نِقْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo berezaaka min sakhateka wa a-o’ozo be-a’fweka min niqmateka.

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with Your pleasure from Your ire and I seek refuge with Your forgiveness from Your wrath.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا اَعْطَيْتَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma ainiy aaeudh bik la manie lima aaetayt

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You – nobody can deny to the one whom You have given,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ وَ لَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ.
segments.transliteration: w la mueti lima manaet w la yanfae dha aljadi mink aljadu.

translation.en: and nobody can give to the one whom You have denied and nobody's efforts come to fruition without You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مَتِّعْنِيْ بِسَمْعِيْ وَ بَصَرِيْ
segments.transliteration: aalllhuma matieni bisamei w basari

translation.en: O Allah! Grant me the use of my hearing and sight

segments.arabic: اجْعَلْهُمَا الْوَارِثَيْنِ مِنِّيْ وَ اَرِنِيْ ثَارِيْ مِنْ عَدُوِّيْ.وَ
segments.transliteration: w ajealhuma alwarithayn miniy w aarini thari min eaduiy.

translation.en: and let them stay with me till my death and show me the destruction of my enemies.

text.en: Twenty-sixth: Zikr after Fajr Prayer :
From Sayyid Ibn Taaoos in al-Iqbaal: Narrated from Ja'far ibn Muhammad (a.s.) from his father (a.s.), who said in a hadees: When the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.a.) had completed his Morning Prayer, he
Twenty-seventh: 27. His Dua After The Zohr Prayer

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰـهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْعَظِيْمُ الْحَلِيْم
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laahul a’zeemul haleemo

translation.en: There is no god but Allah, the Great, the Clement.

segments.arabic: الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْم لَا اِلٰـهَ اِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho rabbul a’rshil azeeme

translation.en: There is no god but Allah, the Lord of the throne of Grace.

segments.arabic: وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْن
segments.transliteration: wal hamdo lillaahe rabbil a’alameena

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ مُوْجِبَاتِ رَحْمَتِك
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka moojebaate rahmateka

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You for all that which is the cause of Your Mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ عَزَآئِمَ مَغْفِرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a’zaa-ema maghferateka

translation.en: and that which ascertains Your Forgiveness;

segments.arabic: وَ الْغَنِيْمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ
segments.transliteration: wal ghaneemata min kulle khayrin

translation.en: and benefit from every virtue,

segments.arabic: وَ السَّلاَمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ اِثْم
segments.transliteration: was salaamata min kulle ismIn.

translation.en: and safety from every sin.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَدَعْ لِيْ ذَنْبًا اِلَّا غَفَرْتَه
segments.transliteration: allaahumma laa tada’ lee zamban illaa ghafartahu

translation.en: O Allah! Leave not any sin for me but that You forgive it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا هَمًّا اِلَّا فَرَّجْتَه
segments.transliteration: wa laa hamman illaa farrajtahu

translation.en: any affliction but that You remove it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا سُقْمًا اِلَّا شَفَيْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa laa suqman illaa shafaytahu

translation.en: any illness but that You heal it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا عَيْبًا اِلَّا سَتَرْتَه
segments.transliteration: wa laa a’yban illaa satartahu

translation.en: any defect but that You conceal it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا رِزْقًا اِلَّا بَسَطْتَه
segments.transliteration: wa laa rizqan illaa basat-tahu

translation.en: any sustenance but that You increase it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا خَوْفاً اِلَّا آمَنْتَه
segments.transliteration: wa laa khawfan illaa aamantahu

translation.en: any fear but that You protect (me) from it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا دَيْنًا اِلَّا قَضَيْتَه
segments.transliteration: (wa laa daynan illaa qazaytahu)

segments.arabic: وَ لَا سُوْءًا اِلَّا صَرَفْتَه
segments.transliteration: Wa laa sooo-an illaa saraftahu

translation.en: any evil but that You repel it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَاجَةً هِيَ لَكَ رِضًا
segments.transliteration: Wa laa haajatan heya laka rezan

translation.en: and any of my needs in which is Your pleasure

segments.arabic: وَ لِيَ فِيْهَا صَلاَحٌ اِلَّا قَضَيْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa leya feehaa salaahun illa qazaytahaa

translation.en: and which is beneficial for me, but that you Grant it;

segments.arabic: يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ اٰمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: yaa arhamar raahemeena aameena rabbal a’alameena.

translation.en: O Most Merciful! Grant me my supplication, Lord of the Universe.

text.en: Twenty-eighth: 8. His Dua In His Sujood (Prostration)

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مَغْفِرَتُكَ اَوْسَعُ مِنْ ذُنُوْبِي
segments.transliteration: allaahumma maghferatoka awsa-o’ min zonoobee

translation.en: O Allah! Your forgiveness is greater than my sins

segments.arabic: وَ رَحْمَتُكَ اَرْجٰي عِنْدِيْ مِنْ عَمَلِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa rahmatoka arjaa i’ndee min a’malee

translation.en: and I am more hopeful of Your mercy than of my actions,

segments.arabic: فَاغْفِرْ لِيْ ذُنُوْبِيْ يَا حَيًّا لَا يَمُوْتُ.
segments.transliteration: faghfir lee zonoobee yaa hayyan laa yamooto.

translation.en: so forgive my sins; O Living! Who never dies!

text.en: Twenty-ninth: 29. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Wanted To Leave (After Completing) His Prayer

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo laa elaaha illaa anta

translation.en: O Allah! For You is all praise, there is no god but you,

segments.arabic: عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَ الشَّهَادَۃِ
segments.transliteration: a’alemul ghaybe wash shahaadate.

translation.en: Knower of the unseen and the seen.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اذْهِبْ عَنَّا الْهَمّوَ الْحُزْنَ وَ الْفِتَن
segments.transliteration: allaahummaz hib a’nnal hamma wal huzna wal fetana

translation.en: O Allah! Take away from us all worry, sorrow and trials,

segments.arabic: مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَ مَا بَطَنَ
segments.transliteration: maa zahara minhaa wa maa batana.

translation.en: both the open and the concealed.

text.en: Thirtieth: 30. His Dua After The Prayer

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ َ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You

segments.arabic: مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَع<
segments.transliteration: min i’lmin laa yanfa-o’

translation.en: from the knowledge that does not benefit,

segments.arabic: وَ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ وَ
segments.transliteration: wa qalbin laa yakh-sha-o’ wa nafsin

translation.en: and the heart that does not fear (You), and the soul

segments.arabic: لَا تَشْبَعُ وَ دُعَاءٍ لَا يُسْمَع وَ نَفْسٍ
segments.transliteration: laa tashba-o’ wa do-a’aa-in laa yusma-o’

translation.en: that does not become satisfied, and the supplication that is not heard.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ هٰؤُلَاءِ الْاَرْبَعِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka min haa-oolaa-il arba’.

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You from these four things.

text.en: Thirtyfirst 31. His Salah And Dua At The Beginning Of The New Year

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَنْتَ الْاِلٰهُ الْقَدِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma antal elaahul qadeemo

translation.en: O Allah! You are the Eternal Lord,

segments.arabic: وَ هٰذِهٖ سَنَةٌ جَدِيْدَةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa haazehi sanatun jadeedatun

translation.en: and this is a new year,

segments.arabic: فَاَسْاَلُكَ فِيْهَا الْعِصْمَة
segments.transliteration: fa-asaloka feehal i’smata

translation.en: so I ask that You grant me protection

segments.arabic: مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: menash shaytaane

translation.en: from Shaitan,

segments.arabic: وَ الْقُوَّةَ عَلٰى هٰذِهِالنَّفْسِ الْاَمَّارَةِ بِالسُّوْءِ
segments.transliteration: wal quwwata a’laa haazehin nafsil ammaarate bis-soo-e

translation.en: and control over this voluptuous self that incites towards evil,

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِشْتِغَالَ بِمَا يُقَرِّبُنِيْ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wal ishteghaala bemaa yoqarrebonee elayka

translation.en: and being occupied in that which would bring me closer to You,

segments.arabic: يَا كَرِيْمُ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالوَ الْاِكْرَامِ
segments.transliteration: yaa kareemo yaa zal jalaale wal ikraame

translation.en: O Most Kind! O Lord of Might and Majesty!

segments.arabic: يَا عِمَادَ مَنْلَا عِمَادَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa e’maada man laa e’maada lahu

translation.en: O Supporter of the one who has no supporter!

segments.arabic: يَا ذَخِيْرَةَ مَنلَا ذَخِيْرَةَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa zakheerata man laa zakheerata lahu

translation.en: O Protector of the one who has no protector!

segments.arabic: يَا حِرْزَ مَنْلَا حِرْزَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa hirza man laa hirza lahu

translation.en: O Guardian of the one who has no guardian!

segments.arabic: يَا غِيَاثَ مَنْلَا غِيَاثَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa gheyaasa man laa gheyaasa lahu

translation.en: O Helper of the one who has no helper!

segments.arabic: يَا سَنَدَ مَنلَا سَنَدَ لَه
segments.transliteration: yaa sanada man laa sanada lahu

translation.en: O Assister of the one who has no assister!

segments.arabic: يَا كَنْزَ مَنْلَا كَنْزَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa kanza man laa kanza lahu

translation.en: O Reinforcement of the one who has no reinforcement!

segments.arabic: يَا حَسَنَ الْبَلَاءيَا عَظِيْمَ الرَّجَاءِ
segments.transliteration: yaa hasanal balaa-e yaa a’zeemar rajaa-e

translation.en: O Granter of gracious gifts, O Source of great hope!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْقِذَ الْغَرْقٰىيَا عِزَّ الضُّعَفَاءِ
segments.transliteration: yaa munqezal gharqaa yaa i’zzaz zo-a’faa-e

translation.en: O Esteem of the weak! O Rescuer of the drowning!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْجِيَ الْهَلْكٰى يَا مُنْعِم
segments.transliteration: yaa munjeyal halkaa yaa mune’mo

translation.en: O Savior of the devastated! O Benefactor!

segments.arabic: يَا مُجْمِلُ يَا مُفْضِلُ يَا مُحْسِنُ اَنْتَ الَّذِي
segments.transliteration: yaa mujmelo yaa mufzelo yaa mohseno antal lazee

translation.en: O Beautifier! O Granter of excellence! O Bestower! You are the One to whom

segments.arabic: سَجَدَ لَكَ سَوَادُ اللَّيْل
segments.transliteration: sajada laka sawaadul layle

translation.en: prostrate the darkness of night

segments.arabic: وَ نُوْرُ النَّهَاوَ ضَوْءُ الْقَمَرر
segments.transliteration: wa noorun nahaare wa zaw-ul qamare

translation.en: and the light of day, the brightness of the moon

segments.arabic: وَ شُعَاعُ الشَّمْسِ وَ دَوِيُّ الْمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa dawiyyul maa-e wa sho-a’a-u’sh shamse

translation.en: and rays of the sun, the sound of (gushing) water

segments.arabic: وَ حَفِيْفُ الشَّجَرِيَا اَللهُ
segments.transliteration: wa hafeefush shajare yaa allaaho

translation.en: and the rustling of the trees; O Allah!

segments.arabic: لَا شَرِيْكَ لَكَاَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْنَا خَيْرًامِمَّا يَظُنُّوْنَ
segments.transliteration: laa shareeka laka allaahummaj a’lnaa khayran mimmaa yazunnoona

translation.en: You have no partner. O Allah! Make us the best of what they conjecture (about us)

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لَنَا مَالَا يَعْلَمُوْنَ حَسْبِيَ اللهُ
segments.transliteration: wagh fir lanaa maa laa ya’lamoona hasbeyal

translation.en: and forgive us that which they do not know (of our faults). Allah is enough for me

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا هُوعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
segments.transliteration: laaho laa elaaha illaa howa a’layhe tawakkalto

translation.en: there is no god but He; in Him do I trust

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa howa rabbul a’rshila’zeeme

segments.arabic: مِنْ عِنْدِ رَبِّنَا آمَنَّا بِهٖ كُلّ
segments.transliteration: aamannaa behi kullun min i’nde rabbenaa

translation.en: We believe in it – everything is from our Lord,

segments.arabic: وَ مَا يَذَّكَّراِلَّا اُوْلُوْا الْاَلْبَابِ رَبَّنَا
segments.transliteration: wa maa yazzakkaro illaa oolul albaabe rabbanaa

translation.en: and none takes admonition except those who possess intellect. Our Lord!

segments.arabic: لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوْبَنَا وَ هَبْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: laa tozigh qoloobanaa wa hab lanaa

translation.en: Make not our hearts deviate

segments.arabic: مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةاِنَّكَ اَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ.
segments.transliteration: min ladunka rahmatan innaka antal wahhaab

translation.en: and bestow Your mercy on us, indeed You are All-Munificent.

text.en: Thirty two: 32. His Dua On The Night Of Fifteenth Of Sha'ban

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنَا مِنْ خَشْيَتِك
segments.transliteration: allaahummaq sim lanaa min khasyateka

translation.en: O Allah! Grant us as much fear of You

segments.arabic: وَ بَيْنَ مَعْصِيَتِكَ ما يَحُوْلُ بَيْنَنَا
segments.transliteration: maa yahoolo baynanaa wa bayna ma’seyate ka

translation.en: as would prevent us from your disobedience,and as much obedience

segments.arabic: مَا تُبَلِّغُنَا بِهٖ رِضْوانَك وَ مِنْ طاعَتِك
segments.transliteration: wa min ta-a’teka maa toballeghonaa behi rizwaanaka

translation.en: as would make us attain your pleasure, and as much certainty

segments.arabic: بِهٖ مُصِيْبَاتِ الدُّنْيَا ما يَهُوْنُ عَلَيْنَا وَ مِنَ الْيَقِيْن
segments.transliteration: wa menal yaqeene maa yahoono a’laynaa behi mosee-baatid dunyaa.

translation.en: as would make bearable for us the tribulations of this world.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مَتِّعْنَا بِاَسْمَاعِنَاوَ اَبْصَارِنَا وَ قُوَّتِنَا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma matte’naa be-asmaa-e’naa wa absaarenaa wa quwwatenaa

translation.en: O Allah! Grant us the use of our hearing, sight and strength

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْهُ الْوَارِثَ مِنَّا مَا اَحْيَيْتَنَا
segments.transliteration: maa ahyaytanaa waj a’lahul waaresa minnaa

translation.en: in the life You have given us, and let it remain with us until we die,

segments.arabic: مَنْ ظَلَمَنَا وَ انْصُرْنَا وَ اجْعَلْ ثَارَنَا عَلٰى
segments.transliteration: waj a’l saaranaa a’laa man zalamanaa wan surnaa

translation.en: and avenge those who have oppressed us, and help us against those

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلْ عَلٰى مَنْ عَادَانَا
segments.transliteration: a’laa man a’adaanaa wa laa taj-a’l

translation.en: who have become our enemies, and do not keep

segments.arabic: مُصِيْبَتَنَا فِيْ دِيْنِنَا
segments.transliteration: mosebatanaa fee deenenaa

translation.en: tribulations for us in our religion,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلِ الدُّنْيَا اَكْبَرَ هَمِّنَا
segments.transliteration: wa laa taj-a’lid dunyaa akbara hammenaa

translation.en: and do not make this world our greatest concern,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مَبْلَغَ عِلْمِنَاوَ لَا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa laa mabagha i’lmenaa wa laa tosallit a’laynaa

translation.en: nor the limit of our knowledge, and do not make sovereign upon us

segments.arabic: مَنْ لا يَرْحَمُنَا بِرَحْمَتِك
segments.transliteration: man laa yarhamonaa be-rahmateka

translation.en: one who has no mercy on us, by your mercy

segments.arabic: يا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: O Most Merciful of mercifuls.

segments.arabic: اَصْبَحْتُ اِلَيْكَ فَقِيْرًا خَائِفًا مُسْتَجِيْرًا
segments.transliteration: asbahto elayka faqeeran khaa-efan mustajeeran

translation.en: I come to You as a beggar, fearful, seeking refuge,

segments.arabic: فَلَا تُبَدِّلْ اِسْمِيْ وَ لَا تُغَيِّرْ جِسْمِيْ
segments.transliteration: falaa tobaddil ismee wa laa toghayyir jismee

translation.en: so do not change my status, and do not alter my body

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْتَهِدْ بَلَائِيْ وَ اغْفِرْلِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tajtahid balaa-ee wagh fir lee.

translation.en: and do not make severe my tribulations, and forgive me.

segments.arabic: سَجَدَ لَكَ سَوَادِيْ وَ خَيَالِيْوَ آمَنَ بِذٰلِكَ فُؤَادِيْ
segments.transliteration: sajada laka sawaadi wa khayaalee wa aamana bezaaleka fo-aadee.

translation.en: My body and mind have prostrated to you, and by this has my heart gained faith.

segments.arabic: وَ هٰذِهٖ يَدَايَ بِمَا جَنَيْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa Haazehi yadaaya bemaa janayto

translation.en: These are my hands with which i have oppressed

segments.arabic: عَلٰى نَفْسِيْ يَا عَظِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: a’laa nafsee yaa a’zeemo

translation.en: my soul, O Greatest

segments.arabic: يُرْجٰى لِكُلِّ عَظِيْمٍ اِغْفِرْ لِيْ ذَنْبِيَ الْعَظِيْمَ فَاِنَّهٗ
segments.transliteration: Yurjaa lekulle a’zeemin ighfir lee zanbeyal a’zeema fa-innahu

translation.en: upon whom is the greatest hope, forgive my greatest sin,

segments.arabic: لَا يَغْفِرُ الذَّنْبَ الْعَظِيْمَ اِلَّا الْعَظِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: laa yaghferuz zambal a’zeema illal a’zeemo.

translation.en: for none forgives the greatest sin but the greatest.

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِعَفْوِكَ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: a-o’ozo be-a’fweka min e’qaabeka

translation.en: I seek refuge in Your forgiveness

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo be-rezaaka min sakhateka

translation.en: from Your chastisement,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوْبَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo be-mo-a’afaateka min o’qoobateka

translation.en: and I seek refuge in Your grace from Your punishment,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka minka anta

translation.en: and I seek refuge in You from You;

segments.arabic: كَمَا اَثْنَيْتَ عَلٰى نَفْسِكَ
segments.transliteration: kamaa asnayta a’laa nafseka

translation.en: You are as You have described Yourself

segments.arabic: وَ فَوْقَ مَا يَقُوْلُ الْقَائِلُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa fawqa maa yaqoolul qaaeloon.

translation.en: and above what the speakers speak.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِنُوْرِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo be-noore

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with the light

segments.arabic: وَجْهِكَ الَّذِيْ اَشْرَقَتْ لَهُ السَّمَاوَاتُ
segments.transliteration: wajhekal lazee ash-raqat lahus samaawaato

translation.en: of Your presence by which the heavens

segments.arabic: وَ الْاَرْضُ وَ قَشَعَتْ بِهِ الظُّلُمَاتُ
segments.transliteration: wal arzo wa qasha-a’t behiz zolomaato

translation.en: and the earth radiate, and by which the darkness dispels,

segments.arabic: وَ صَلُحَ بِهٖ اَمْرُ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa saloha behi amrul awwaleena

translation.en: and through which the affairs of the first and last improve;

segments.arabic: وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ اَنْ يَحِلَّ عَلَيّ
segments.transliteration: wal aakhereena an yahilla a’layya

translation.en: and (I seek refuge) from Your anger covering me

segments.arabic: غَضَبُكَ اَوْ يُنْزِلَ عَلَيَّ سَخَطُكَ
segments.transliteration: ghazaboka aw yunzela a’layya sakhatoka.

translation.en: and Your wrath coming upon me.

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ وَ فَجْأَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: a-o’ozo min zawaale ne’mateka wa faj-ate niqmateka

translation.en: I seek refuge from the reduction of Your bounties,

segments.arabic: وَ تَحْوِيْلِ عَافِيَتِكَ وَ جَمِيْعِ سَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tahweele a’afeyateka wa jamee-e’ sakhateka.

translation.en: and the suddenness of Your retribution, and the cessation of the well-being You have granted, and all Your displeasure.

segments.arabic: لَكَ الْعُتْبٰى فِيْمَا اسْتَطَعْتُ
segments.transliteration: lakal u’tbaa feemas ta-ta’to

translation.en: You admonish me for what I have the ability to perform

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa beka.

translation.en: and there is no power or might but by Your will.

text.en: Thirty three: 33. His Dua Upon Seeing The New-Moon

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ اَللّٰهُمَّ اَهِلَّهٗ عَلَيْنَا ِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahe allaahumma ahillahu a’laynaa

translation.en: In the name of Allah. O Allah! Make it come upon us

segments.arabic: بِالْاَمْن وَ الْاِيْمَانِ وَ السَّلَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: bil-amne wal eemaane was salaamate

translation.en: with harmony and faith, peace and submission (to You)

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِسْلَامِ رَبِّيْ وَ رَبُّكَ الله
segments.transliteration: wal islaame rabbee wa rabbokal laah.

translation.en: My Lord and your Lord is Allah.

text.en: Thirty four: 34. His Dua Upon Seeing The New-Moon Of The Month Of Ramazan

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَهِلَّهٗ عَلَيْنَا بِالْاَمْنِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ahillahu a’laynaa bil-amne

translation.en: O Allah! Make it come upon us with harmony

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِيْمَانِ وَ السَّلَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wal eemaane was salaamate

translation.en: and faith, peace

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِسْلَامِ وَ الْعَافِيَةِ الْمُجَلَّلَةِ
segments.transliteration: wal islaame wal a’afeyatil mojallalate

translation.en: and submission, well-being

segments.arabic: وَ دِفَاعِ الْاَسْقَامِ وَ الْعَوْنِ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ
segments.transliteration: wa de-faa-i’l asqaame wal a’wne a’las salaate

translation.en: and protection from maladies, and help in prayer

segments.arabic: وَ الصِّيَامِ وَ تِلَاوَةِ الْقُرْآنِ
segments.transliteration: was seyaame wa telaawatil quraane.

translation.en: and fasting and reciting the Qur'an.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ سَلِّمْنَا لِشَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma sallimnaa le-shahre ramazaaana

translation.en: O Allah! Make us turn to the month of Ramazan

segments.arabic: وَ تَسَلَّمْهُ مِنَّا وَ سَلِّمْنَا فِيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa tasallamho minnaa wa sallimnaa feehe

translation.en: and make it receive us, and make us submissive in it,

segments.arabic: حَتّٰى يَنْقَضِيَ عَنَّا شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: hattaa yanqazeya a’nnaa shahro ramazaana

translation.en: until the month of Ramazan ends

segments.arabic: وَ قَدْ عَفَوْتَ عَنَّا وَ غَفَرْتَ لَنَا وَ رَحِمْتَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa qad a’fawta a’nnnaa wa ghafarta lanaa wa rahimtanaa.

translation.en: while You have pardoned and forgiven us and had mercy on us.

text.en: Thirty five 35. His Daily Zikr

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ

translation.en: alhamdo lillaahe rabbil a'alameena

text.en: Many praises be to Allah – Lord of the Universe –

segments.arabic: كَثِيْرًا عَلٰي كُلِّ حَالٍ
segments.transliteration: kaseeran a’laa kulle haal.

translation.en: in all conditions.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ كَثِيْرًا عَلٰي كُلِّ حَالٍ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahe kaseeran a’laa kulle haal.

translation.en: Many praises be to Allah in all conditions.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahe rabbil a’alameena

translation.en: Many good praises be to Allah – Lord of the Universe,

segments.arabic: كَثِيْرًا طَيِّبًا عَلٰي كُلِّ حَالٍ
segments.transliteration: kaseeran tayyeban a’laa kulle haal.

translation.en: in all conditions.

text.en: Thirty six 36 His Zikr In The Morning And Evening

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَصْبَحْتُ اُسَبِّحُكَ

translation.en: allaahumma innee asbahto osabbehoka

text.en: O Allah! I start my day by praising

segments.arabic: وَ اُمَجِّدُكَ وَ اُحَمِّدُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa omajjedoka wa ohammedoka

translation.en: and glorifying You

segments.arabic: وَ اُهَلِّلُكَ بِعَدَدِ مَا اُدِيْرُ بِهٖ سُبْحَتِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa ohalleloka be-a’dade maa odeero behi subhatee.

translation.en: as many times as I have turned my prayer-beads.

text.en: Thirty seven 37. His Remedy For Headache
77. Remedy For Headache And Ailments
Thirty eight 38 Seeking Protection From Fever And Other Ailments

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka

translation.en: O Allah! I seek refuge with You

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ عِرْقٍ نَعَّارٍ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ حَرِّ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: min sharre i’rqin na’-a’arin wa min sharre harrin naare.

translation.en: from the harm of a gushing blood-vessel and from the evil of the fire of hell.

text.en: Thirty nine 39. His Invocation For Protection From Fever

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ اَرْقِيْكَ بِسْمِ اللهِ اَشْفِيْكَ

translation.en: bismil laahe arqeeka bismil laahe ashfeeka

text.en: In the name of Allah – I invoke (for) you. In the name of Allah – I cure you

segments.arabic: مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ يُؤْذِيْكَ
segments.transliteration: min kulle daa-in yoazeeka

translation.en: of every ailment that afflicts you

segments.arabic: وَ اللهُ شَافِيْكَ بِسْمِ اللهِ خُذْهَا فَلْتُهَنِّيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wal laaho shaafeeka bismil laahe khuzhaa faltohanneeka

translation.en: and Allah is your Healer. In the name of Allah – take it as it brings you well-being.

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahir rahmaanir raheem.

translation.en: In the name of Allah the Compassionate the Merciful.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُوْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa laa uqsemo be-mawaa-qe-i’n nojoome

translation.en: I swear by the setting of the stars.

segments.arabic: وَ اِنَّهٗ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُوْنَ عَظِيْمٌ
segments.transliteration: wa innahu laqasamun law ta’lamoona a’zeemun

translation.en: And that is indeed a mighty adjuration if you but knew.

segments.arabic: لَتَبَرَّاَنَّ بِاِذْنِ اللهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
segments.transliteration: la-tabarra-anna be-iznil laahe a’zza wa jalla.

translation.en: You will surely recover by the will of Allah the Almighty.

text.en: Forty 40. His Invocation For Protection From Magic

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ اَرْقِيْكَ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ يُؤْذِيْكَ

translation.en: bismil laahe arqeeka min kulle shay-in yoazeeka

text.en: In the name of Allah I protect you from all things that harm you

segments.arabic: مِنْ حَاسِدٍ وَ عَيْنٍ وَ اللهُ يَشْفِيْكَ
segments.transliteration: min haasedin wa a’ynin wal laaho yashfeeka.

translation.en: from the jealous one and the evil eye – and may Allah cure you.

text.en: Forty one 41. Another One Of His Invocations

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الشَّافِيْ بِسْمِ اللهِ الْكَافِيْ

translation.en: bismil laahish shaafee bismil laahil kaafee

text.en: In the name of Allah the Healer, in the name of Allah the Sufficient

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الْمُعَافِيْ بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِيْ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahil mo-a’afee bismil laahil lazee

translation.en: in the name of Allah the Nourisher, in the name of Allah with Whose name

segments.arabic: لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهٖ شَيْءٌ فِي الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: laa yazurro ma-a’s me-hi shay-un fil arze

translation.en: nothing in the earth

segments.arabic: وَ لَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَ هُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: wa laa fis samaa-e wa howas samee-u’l a’leemo.

translation.en: or heaven can cause (us) harm and He is All-hearing All- seeing.

text.en: Forty two 42. His Dua When Distressed Or Troubled

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّوْمُ يَا حَيًّا لَا يَمُوْتُ
segments.transliteration: yaa hayyo yaa qayyoomo yaa hayyan laa yamooto

translation.en: O Ever-living! O Ever-lasting! O Ever-living Who never dies!

segments.arabic: يَا حَيُّ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ كَاشِفُ الْهَمِّ
segments.transliteration: yaa hayyo laa elaaha illaa anta kaasheful hamme

translation.en: O Ever-living there is no god but You. Remover of the troubles!

segments.arabic: مُجِيْبُ دَعْوَةِ الْمُضْطَرِّيْنَ
segments.transliteration: mojeebo da’watil muztarreen.

translation.en: Answerer of the calls of the desperate!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِاَنَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا
segments.transliteration: as-aloka be-anna lakal hamda laa elaaha illaa

translation.en: I ask You, as all praise is due to You – there is no god but

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ الْمَنَّانُ بَدِيْعُ السَّمٰوَاتِوَ الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: antal mannaano badee-u’s samaawaate wal arze

translation.en: You – O Bestower of favors! Originator of the heavens and the earth!

segments.arabic: ذُو الْجَلَالِوَ الْإِكْرَامِ رَحْمٰنَ الدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: zul jalaale wal ikraame rahmaanad dunyaa

translation.en: Lord of Might and Glory! The Beneficent in this world

segments.arabic: وَ الْآخِرَةِ وَ رَحِيْمَهُمَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: wal aakherate wa raheemahomaa rabbe

translation.en: and the next and the Merciful in them both! O Lord! Bless me with the mercy

segments.arabic: اِرْحَمْنِيْ رَحْمَةً تُغْنِيَنِيْ بِهَا عَنْ رَحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: irhamnee rahmatan tughneyanee behaa a’n rahmate

translation.en: that would make me free from needing mercy

segments.arabic: مَنْ سِوَاكَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: man sewaaka yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: from other than You, O Most Merciful of the mercifuls.

text.en: 43. His Dua For Memorizing The Noble Quran

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِيْ بِتَرْكِ مَعَاصِيْكَ مَا اَبْقَيْتَنِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahummar hamnee betarke ma-a’aseeka maa abqaytanee

translation.en: O Allah! Bless me with the ability to keep away from Your disobedience for the rest of my life;

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنِيْ حُسْنَ النَّظَرِ فِيْمَا يُرْضِيْكَ عَنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: war zuqnee husnan nazare feemaa yurzeeka a’nnee

translation.en: and grant me the ability to see the good in what pleases You,

segments.arabic: وَ اَلْزِمْ قَلْبِيْ حِفْظَ كِتَابِكَ كَمَا عَلَّمْتَنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa alzim qalbee hifza ketaabeka kamaa a’llamtanee

translation.en: and make my heart memorize Your book as You have taught me;

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ اَتْلُوْهُ عَلَى النَّحْوِ الَّذِيْ يُرْضِيْكَ عَنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: waj a’lnee atlooho a’lan nahvil lazee yurzeeka a’nnee.

translation.en: and enable me to recite it in the way that pleases You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ نَوِّرْ بِكِتَابِكَ بَصَرِيْ وَ اشْرَحْ بِهٖ صَدْرِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma nawwir beketaabeka basaree wash rah behi sadree

translation.en: O Allah! Illuminate my sight by Your book, and expand by it my chest,
