segments.arabic: وَ فَرِّحْ بِهٖ قَلْبِيْ وَ اَطْلِقْ بِهٖ لِسَانِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa farreh behi qalbee wa atliq behi lesaanee

translation.en: and gratify by it my heart, and make eloquent my speech by it,

segments.arabic: وَ اسْتَعْمِلْ بِهٖ بَدَنِيْ وَ قَوِّنِيْ عَلٰى ذٰلِكَ فَاِنَّهٗ
segments.transliteration: was ta’mil behi badani wa qawwenee a’laa zaaleka fa-innahu

translation.en: and make my body work by it and strengthen me in this for surely

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِكَ
segments.transliteration: laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa beka.

translation.en: there is no might and no power but (by) You.

text.en: Forty four44. His Covering

segments.arabic: وَ جَعَلْنَا عَلٰى قُلُوْبِهِمْ اَكِنَّةً اَنْ يَفْقَهُوْهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa ja-a’lnaa a’laa qoloobehim akinnatan an yafqahooho

translation.en: 'We have cast veils over their hearts lest they understand it

segments.arabic: وَ فِيْ آذَانِهِمْ وَقْرًا وَ اِذَا ذَكَرْتَ رَبَّكَ فِي الْقُرْآن
segments.transliteration: wa fee aazaanehim waqraa. Wa EZAA zakarta rabbaka fil qur-aane

translation.en: and a heaviness in their ears' 'And when you remember your Lord alone, in the Qur'an,

segments.arabic: وَحْدَهٗ وَلَّوْا عَلٰى اَدْبَارِهِمْ نُفُوْرًا
segments.transliteration: wahdahu wallaw a’laa adbaarehim nofooraa.

translation.en: they turn their backs in aversion'

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِمَا وَارَتِ الْحُجُبُ مِنْ جَلَالِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allaahumma BEMAA waaratil hojobo min jalaaleka

translation.en: O Allah! By that which Your Might and Majesty have covered,

segments.arabic: وَ جَمَالِكَ وَ بِمَا اَطَافَ بِهِ الْعَرْشُ
segments.transliteration: wa jamaaleka wa BEMAA ataafa BEHIL a’rsho

translation.en: and by that which have been engulfed by the perfection of Your Sovereignty,

segments.arabic: مِنْ بَهَاءِ كَمَالِكَ وَ بِمَعَاقِدِ الِعزِّ
segments.transliteration: min bahaa-e kamaaleka wa bema-a’aqedil i’zze

translation.en: and by the honor that comes forth from Your Infinite Knowledge,

segments.arabic: مِنْ عَرْشِكَ وَ بِمَا تُحِيْطُ بِهٖ قُدْرَتُكَ
segments.transliteration: min a’rsheka wa BEMAA toheeto BEHI qudratoka

translation.en: and by that which is encompassed by Your Dominion;

segments.arabic: مِنْ مَلَكُوْتِ سُلْطَانِكَ يَا مَنْ لَا رَادَّ لِاَمْرِهٖ
segments.transliteration: min malakoote sultaaneka yaa man laa raadda le-amrehi

translation.en: O One Whose command cannot be overruled

segments.arabic: وَ لَا مُعَقِّبَ لِحُكْمِهٖ اِضْرِبْ بَيْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa laa moa’qqeba le-hukmehi izrib baynee

translation.en: and Whose ruling cannot be overturned!

segments.arabic: وَ بَيْنَ اَعْدَائِيْ بِسِتْرِكَ الَّذِىْ
segments.transliteration: wa BAYNA a-a’daa-ee be-sitrekal LAZEE

translation.en: Place between myself and my enemies a covering that

segments.arabic: لَا تُفَرِّقُهُ الْعَوَاصِفُ مِنَ الرِّيَاحِ
segments.transliteration: laa tofarreqohul a’waasefo menar reyaahe

translation.en: cannot be removed even by strong winds,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَقْطَعُهُ الْبَوَاتِرُ مِنَ الصِّفَاحِ
segments.transliteration: wa laa taq-ta-o’hul bawaatero menas sefaahe

translation.en: and or can it be cut by sharp blades,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَنْفُذُهٗ عَوَامِلُ الرِّمَاحِ حُلَّ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tanfozohu a’waamelur remaahe hulla

translation.en: nor can spears pierce it. O One Whose Might is great!

segments.arabic: يَا شَدِيْدَ الْبَطْشِ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa shadeedal batshe baynee wa BAYNA

translation.en: Guard me from the one who has taken aim at me with his arrows

segments.arabic: مِنْ يَرْمِيْنِيْ بِخَوَافِقِهٖ وَ مَنْ تَسَرّٰى اِلَىَّ
segments.transliteration: min yarmeenee be-khawaafeqehi wa man tasarraa elayya

translation.en: and the one who makes me the target of his strikes;

segments.arabic: طَوَارِقُهٗ وَ فَرِّجْ عَنِّيْ كُلَّ هَمٍّ
segments.transliteration: tawaareqohu wa farrij a’nnee kulla hammin

translation.en: and remove from me every sorrow

segments.arabic: وَ غَمٍّ يَا فَارِجَ هَمِّ يَعْقُوْبَ فَرِّجْ عَنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: wa ghammin yaa faareja hamme ya’qooba farrij a’nnee

translation.en: and hardship. O remover of the sorrows of Ya'qub! Remove my sorrows;

segments.arabic: يَا كَاشِفَ ضُرِّ اَيُّوْبَ اِكْشِفْ ضُرِّىْ
segments.transliteration: yaa kaashefa zurre ayyooba ikshif zurree

translation.en: O Eliminator of the hardships of Ayyub! Eliminate my hardships;

segments.arabic: وَ اغْلِبْ لِىْ مَنْ غَلَبَنِيْ يَا غَالِبًا غَيْرَ مَغْلُوْبٍ
segments.transliteration: wagh lib lee man ghalabanee yaa ghaaleban ghayra maghloobin

translation.en: and defeat for me the one who has defeated me, O Defeater Who cannot be defeated.

segments.arabic: وَ رَدَّ اللهُ الَّذِيْنَ كَفَرُوْا بِغَيْظِهِمْ لَمْ يَنَالُوْا خَيْرًا
segments.transliteration: wa raddal laahul LAZEENA kafaroo be-ghayzehim lam yanaaloo khayran

translation.en: 'And Allah turned back the unbelievers in their rage; they did not obtain any advantage,

segments.arabic: وَ كَفَي اللهُ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ الْقِتَالَ وَ كَانَ اللهُ
segments.transliteration: wa kafal laahul moa-meenal qetaala wa kaanAL LAAHO

translation.en: and Allah sufficed the believers in their fight and Allah is

segments.arabic: قَوِّيًا عَزِيْزًا. فَاَيَّدْنَا الَّذِيْنَ آمَنُوْا
segments.transliteration: qawiyyan a’zeezaa. Fa-ayyadnal lazeena aamanoo

translation.en: Strong and Mighty' 'Then We aided those who believed

segments.arabic: عَلٰي عَدُوِّهِمْ فَاَصْبَحُوْا ظَاهِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: a’laa a’duwwehim fa-asbahoo zaahereen.

translation.en: against their enemy and they became the ones who prevailed.'

text.en: Forty five.45. His Dua In The Morning

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّىْ اَسْئَلُكَ اِيْمَانًا تُبَاشِرُ بِهٖ قَلْبِىْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka eemaanan tobaashero behi qalbee

translation.en: O Allah! I ask You for faith which gives joy to my heart,

segments.arabic: وَيَقيْنًاًحَتّٰى اَعْلَمُ اَنَّهٗ لَا يُصِيْبُنِىْ
segments.transliteration: wa yaqeenan hattaa a-a’lamo annahu laa yoseebonee

translation.en: and certitude so that I may know that nothing befalls me

segments.arabic: اِلَّا مَا كَتَبْتَ لِىْ وَرَضِّنِىْ بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِىْ
segments.transliteration: illaa maa katabta lee wa razzenee bemaa qasamta lee.

translation.en: except that which You have destined for me, and make me pleased with that which you have apportioned for me.

segments.arabic: يَا عِمَادَ مَنْ لَا عِمَادَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa e’maada man laa e’maada lahu

translation.en: O Supporter of the one with no supporter!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا حِرْزَ مَنْ لَا حِرْزَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa hirza man laa hirza lahu

translation.en: O Protector of the one with no protector!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا ذُخْرَ مَنْ لَا ذُخْرَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa zukhra man laa zukhra lahu

translation.en: O Provider of the one with no provisions!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا سَنَدَ مَنْ لَا سَنَدَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa sanada man laa sanada lahu

translation.en: O Helper of the one with no helper!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا غِيَاثَ مَنْ لَا غِيَاثَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa gheyaasa man laa gheyaasa lahu

translation.en: O Hearer of the unheard appeal!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا كَرِيْمَ الْعَفْوِ وَ يَا حَسَنَ الْبَلَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa kareemal a’fwe wa yaa hasanal balaa-e

translation.en: O Munificent in forgiving! O One Whose trials are good!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا عَظِيْمَ الرَّجَاءِ وَ يَا عَوْنَالضُّعَفَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa a’zeemar rajaa-e wa yaa a’wnaz zo-a’faa-e

translation.en: O Giver of great hope! O Helper of the weak!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مُنْقِذَ الْغَرْقٰى
segments.transliteration: wa yaa munqezal gharqaa

translation.en: O Rescuer of the drowning!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مُنْجِيَ الْهَلْكٰى يَا مُحْسِنُ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa munjeyal halkaa yaa mohseno

translation.en: O Savior of the devastated! O Beneficent!

segments.arabic: يَا مُجْمِلُ يَا مُنْعِمُ يَا مُفْضِلُ
segments.transliteration: yaa mujmelo yaa mun-e’mo yaa mufzelo

translation.en: O Creator of beauty! O Granter of blessings! O Bestower of good!

segments.arabic: الَّذِيْ سَجَدَ لَكَ سَوَادُ اللَّيْلِ
segments.transliteration: antal lazee sajada laka sawaadul layle

translation.en: You are the One to whom prostrate the darkness of night,

segments.arabic: وَ نُوْرُ النَّهَارِ وَ ضَوْءُ الْقَمَرِ
segments.transliteration: wa noorun nahaare wa zaw-ul qamare

translation.en: the light of day, the illumination of the moon,

segments.arabic: وَ شُعَاعُ الشَّمْسِ وَ دَوِيُّ الْمَاء
segments.transliteration: wa sho-a’a-u’sh shamse wa dawiyyul maa-e

translation.en: the rays of the sun, the sound of (running) water

segments.arabic: وَ حَفِيْفُ الشَّجَرِ يَا اَللهُ يَا اَللهُ
segments.transliteration: wa hafeefush shajare yaa allaaho yaa allaaho

translation.en: and the rattling of trees. O Allah! O Allah!

segments.arabic: يَا اَللهُ اَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: yaa allaaho ant wahdaka la sharik laka

translation.en: O Allah! You are One and have no partner.

text.en: Forty six 46. His Invocation

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahir rahmaanir raheem.

translation.en: In the name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اُعِيْذُ نَفْسِىْ وَ دِيْنِيْ وَ اَهْلِىْ
segments.transliteration: oe’ezo nafsee wa deenee wa ahlee

translation.en: I place myself, my religion, my family,

segments.arabic: وَ مَالِىْ وَ وُلْدِىْ وَ خَوَاتِيْمَ عَمَلِىْ
segments.transliteration: wa maalee wa wuldee wa khawaateema a’malee

translation.en: my wealth, my children, the results of my actions

segments.arabic: وَ مَا رَزَقَنِيْ رَبِّىْ وَ خَوَّلَنِيْ بِعِزَّةِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa maa razaqanee rabbee wa khawwalanee be-i’zzatil laahe

translation.en: and that which my Lord has bestowed on me, under the protection of the Respect,

segments.arabic: وَ عَظَمَةِ اللهِ وَ جَبَرُوْتِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa a’zamatil laahe wa jabarootil laahe

translation.en: Grandeur, Majesty,

segments.arabic: وَ سُلْطَانِ اللهِ وَ رَحْمَةِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa sultaanil laahe wa rahmatil laahe

translation.en: Munificence, Mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ رَافَةِ اللهِ وَ غُفْرَانِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa raa-fatil laahe wa ghufraanil laahe

translation.en: Kindness, Forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَ قُوَّةِ اللهِ وَ قُدْرَةِ اللهِ وَ بِآلَاءِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa quwwatil laahe wa qudratil laahe wa be-aalaa-il laahe

translation.en: Power, Might and Bounty of Allah;

segments.arabic: وَ بِصُنْعِ اللهِ و بِاَرْكَانِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa be-sun-i’l laahe wa be-arkaanil laahe

translation.en: By the support of Allah (s.w.t.),

segments.arabic: وَ بِجَمْعِ اللهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
segments.transliteration: wa bejam-i’l laahe a’zza wa jalla

segments.arabic: وَ بِرَسُوْلِ اللهِ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ و آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa be-rasoolil laahe (sallal laaho a’layhe wa aalehi)

translation.en: the Prophet of Allah (s.a.w.a.)

segments.arabic: وَ قُدْرَةِ اللهِ عَلٰي مَا يَشَآءُ مِنْ شَرِّ السَّامَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa qudratil laahe a’laa maa ya-shaaa-o min sharris saammate

translation.en: and the Power of Allah over whatever He wills,

segments.arabic: وَ الْهَامَّةِ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْجِنِّ وَ الْاِنْسِ
segments.transliteration: wal haammate wa min sharril jinne wal inse

translation.en: from the evil of the poisonous and non-poisonous creatures, from the evil of jinn and man,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا دَبَّ فِىْ الْاَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa min SHARRE maa dabba fil arze

translation.en: from the evil of that which moves on the earth,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: wa min SHARRE maa yakhrojo minhaa

translation.en: from the evil of that which comes out from it,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّمَآءِ
segments.transliteration: wa min SHARRE maa yanzelo menas samaaa-e

translation.en: from the evil that descends from the sky

segments.arabic: وَ مَا يَعْرُجُ فِيْهَا وَ مِنْ شَرِّكُلِّ
segments.transliteration: wa maa ya’rojo feehaa wa min SHARRE KULLE

translation.en: and ascends in it and from the evil of every creature

segments.arabic: دَابَّةٍ رَبِّىْ آخِذٌ بِنَاصِيَتِهَا
segments.transliteration: daabbatin rabbee aakhezun be-naaseyatehaa

translation.en: that my Lord holds by its forelock,

segments.arabic: اِنَّ رَبِّىْ عَلٰي صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيْمٍ
segments.transliteration: inna rabbee a’laa seraatim mustaqeemin

translation.en: surely my Lord is on the straight path

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ عَلٰي كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa HOWA a’laa kulle shay-in qadeerun

translation.en: and He has power over all things;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِىِّ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: Wa laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil a’liyyil a’zeem

translation.en: and there is no might and no power but that of Allah the Sublime the Mighty

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلٰي سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa sallal laaho a’laa sayyedenaa mohammadin wa aalehi.

translation.en: and blessings of Allah be on our master Muhammad and his progeny.

text.en: Forty seven 47. His Invocation When In Difficulty Or Great Distress

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: bismil laahir rahmaanir raheem.

translation.en: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: laa hawla wa laa quwwata illaa billaahil a’liyyil a’zeeme.

translation.en: There is no might and no power but that of Allah the Sublime, the Mighty.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَ اِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِيْنُ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma iyyaaka na’bodo wa iyyaaka nastae’eno.

translation.en: O Allah! You alone do we worship and from You alone do we seek help.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ كُفَّ بَأْسَ الَّذِيْنَ كَفَرُوْا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma kuffa baasal lazeena kafaroo

translation.en: O Allah! Restrain the evil of the disbelievers

segments.arabic: فَاِنَّكَ اَشَدُّ بَأْسًا وَ اَشَدُّ تَنْكِيْلًا
segments.transliteration: fa-innaka ashaddo baasan wa ashaddo tankeelaa.

translation.en: for surely You are the strongest in might and punishment.

text.en: Forty eight 48. His Dua When Something Made Him Sad

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ احْرُسْنِيْ بِعَيْنِك الَّتِىْ لَا تَنَامُ
segments.transliteration: allaahummah rusnee be-a’ynekal latee laa tanaamo

translation.en: O Allah! Protect me by Your watchfulness that does not become weary,

segments.arabic: وَ اكْنُفْنِيْ بِرُكْنِكَ الَّذِىْ لَا يُرَامُ
segments.transliteration: wak nufnee be-ruknekal lazee laa yoraamo

translation.en: guard me with Your support which cannot be defeated,

segments.arabic: وَ ارْحَمْنِيْ بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَ لَا اَهْلَكُ
segments.transliteration: war hamnee be-qudrateka a’layya wa laa ahlako

translation.en: have mercy on me by Your power over me, and do not destroy (me)

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ رَجَائِيْ فَكَمْ مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ اَنْعَمْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta rajaa-ee fakam min ne’matin ana’mta

translation.en: while I rely on You. How many blessings have You bestowed upon me

segments.arabic: بِهَا عَلَيَّ قَلَّ لَهَا شُكْرِيْ
segments.transliteration: behaa a’layya qalla lahaa shukree

translation.en: for which my gratitude has come up short,

segments.arabic: وَ كَمْ مِنْ بَلِيَّةٍ اِبْتَلَيْتَنِيْ قَلَّ
segments.transliteration: wa kam min baliyyatin ibtalaytanee qalla

translation.en: and how many trials have you tested me

segments.arabic: لَكَ بِهَا صَبْرِيْ فَيَا مَنْ قَلَّ
segments.transliteration: laka behaa sabree fayaa man qalla

translation.en: with where my patience for Your sake was inadequate?

segments.arabic: عِنْدَ نِعْمَتِهٖ شُكْرِيْ فَلَمْ يَحْرِمْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: i’nda ne’matehi shukree falam yahrimnee

translation.en: O One for Whose blessings my gratitude has come up short but He has not deprived me!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ قَلَّ عِنْدَ بَلِيَّتِهٖ صَبْرِيْ فَلَمْ يَخْذُلْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa man qalla i’nda baliyyatehi sabree falam yakhzulnee

translation.en: O One in Whose trials my patience has been inadequate but He has not abandoned me!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ رَآنِيْ عَلَى الْخَطَايَا فَلَمْ يَفْضَحْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa man ra-aanee a’lal khataayaa falam yafzahnee

translation.en: O One Who has seen my mistakes but has not dishonored me!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى َّمُحَمٍد وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin.

translation.en: I ask You to send Your blessings on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَعِنِّيْ عَلٰى دِيْنِيْ بِالدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma a-i’nnee a’laa deenee bid-dunyaa

translation.en: O Allah! Make this world a means for my religion,

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَى الْآخِرَةِ بِالتَّقْوٰى وَ احْفَظْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa a’lal aakherate bit-taqwaa wah faznee

translation.en: and piety a means for the hereafter. Protect me

segments.arabic: فِيْمَا غِبْتُ عَنْهُ وَ لَا تَكِلْنِيْ اِلٰى نَفْسِيْ
segments.transliteration: feemaa ghibto a’nho wa laa takilnee elaa nafsee

translation.en: from that which is hidden from me and do not leave me on my own

segments.arabic: فِيْمَا حَضَرْتُهٗ يَا مَنْ لَا تَضُرُّهُ الذُّنُوْبُ
segments.transliteration: feemaa hazartohu yaa man laa tazurrohuz zonoobo

translation.en: in the face of what is in front of me. O One Who is not harmed by sins

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَنْقُصُهُ الْمَغْفِرَةُ هَبْ لِيْ مَا لَا يَنْقُصُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tanqosohul maghferato hab lee maa laa yanqosoka

translation.en: and does not lose anything by granting forgiveness! Grant me that from which You lose nothing

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ مَا لَا يَضُرُّكَ اِنَّكَ رَبٌّ وَهَّابٌ
segments.transliteration: wagh fir lee maa laa yazurroka innaka rabbun wahhaab.

translation.en: and forgive me that which does not harm You! You are a Generous Lord.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ فَرَجًا قَرِيْبًا وَ صَبْرًا جَمِيْلًا
segments.transliteration: as-aloka farajan qareeban wa sabran jameelan

translation.en: I ask You for a near deliverance, a graceful patience,

segments.arabic: وَ رِزْقًا وَاسِعًا وَ الْعَافِيَةَ
segments.transliteration: wa rizqan waase-a’n wal a’afeyata

translation.en: abundant sustenance, well-being

segments.arabic: مِنْ جَمِيْعِ الْبَلَاءِ وَ شُكْرَ الْعَافِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: min jamee-i’l balaa-e wa shukral a’afeyate.

translation.en: in the face of all trials and gratitude for all your blessings.

text.en: Forty nine 49. His Dua When He (s.a.w.a.) Saw The New Moon

segments.arabic: اَيُّهَا الْخَلْقُ الْمُطِيْعُ الدَّائِبُ السَّرِيْعالْمُتَصَرِّفُ ُ
segments.transliteration: ayyohal khalqul mo-tee-u’d daa-ebus saree-u’l motasarrefo

translation.en: O Obedient creature – the untiring, fast-moving heavenly body

segments.arabic: فِيْ مَلَكُوْتِ الْجَبَرُوْتِ بِالتَّقْدِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: fee malakootil jabaroote bit-taqdeere!

translation.en: that rotates by the Will of Allah!

segments.arabic: رَبِّيْ وَ رَبُّكَ اللهُ. اَللّٰهُمَّ اَهِلَّهٗ
segments.transliteration: rabbee wa rabbokal laaho. allaahumma ahillahu

translation.en: My Lord and your Lord is Allah. O Allah! Make the new moon come

segments.arabic: عَلَيْنَا بِالْاَمْنِ وَ الْاِيْمَانِ وَ السَّلَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: a’laynaa bil-amne wal eemaane was salaamate

translation.en: upon us with tranquility and faith, and peace and goodness.

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِحْسَانِ وَ كَمَا بَلَّغْتَنَا اَوَّلَهٗ فَبَلِّغْنَا آخِرَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wal ehsaane wa kamaa ballaghtanaa awwalahu faballighnaa aakherahu

translation.en: As You have made us pass the beginning of it, make us pass the end of it.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْهُ شَهْرًا مُبَارَكًا تَمْحُوْ فِيْهِ السَّيِّئَاتِ
segments.transliteration: waj a’lho shahran mobaarakan tamhoo feehis sayye-aate

translation.en: And make it a blessed month wherein You wipe off the evil deeds

segments.arabic: وَ تَرْفَعُ لَنَا فِيْهِ الدَّرَجَاتِ يَا عَظِيْمَ الْخَيْرَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa tarfa-o’ lanaa feehid darajaate yaa a’zeemal khayraate.

translation.en: and elevate our status, O Great Bestower of goodly things.

text.en: Fifty 50. His Dua At The Time Of The New Moon Of Rajab And Other Months

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَهِلَّهٗ عَلَيْنَا بِالْاَمْنِ وَ الْاِيْمَانِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma ahillahu a’laynaa bil-amne wal eemaane

translation.en: O Allah! Make it (the new moon) come upon us with tranquility and faith,

segments.arabic: وَ السَّلَامَۃِ وَ الْاِسْلَامِ
segments.transliteration: was salaamate wal islaame

translation.en: and peace and submission (to Your will).

segments.arabic: رَبِّيْ وَ رَبُّكَ اللهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ
segments.transliteration: rabbee wa rabbokal laaho a’zza wa jalla.

translation.en: My Lord and Your Lord is Allah (s.w.t.).

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيْ رَجَبٍ وَ شَعْبَانَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma baarik lanaa fee rajabin wa sha’baana

translation.en: O Allah! Bless us in Rajab and Sha'ban

segments.arabic: وَ بَلِّغْنَا شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa ballighnaa shahra ramazaana

translation.en: and make us reach the month of Ramazan;

segments.arabic: وَ اَعِنَّا عَلَي الصِّيَامِ وَ الْقِيَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa a-i’nnaa a’las seyaame wal qeyaam

translation.en: and help us to fast and establish prayers

segments.arabic: وَ حِفْظِ اللِّسَانِ وَ غَضِّ الْبَصَرِ
segments.transliteration: wa hifzil lesaane wa ghazzil basare

translation.en: and control the tongue and lower the gaze,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلْ حَظَّنَا مِنْهُ الْجُوْعَ وَ الْعَطَشَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa taj-a’l hazzanaa minhul joo-a’ wal a’tasha.

translation.en: and do not make our only share in it hunger and thirst.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَذْهَبَ شَهْرَ كَذَا وَ جَاءَ بِشَهْرِ كَذَا
segments.transliteration: alhamdo lillaahil lazee azhaba shahra kazaa wa jaa-a be-shahre kazaa.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah who make such-and-such month to pass and brought such-and-such month.

text.en: Fifty 51. his dua after the zohr prayer

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰهاِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ الْعَظِيْمُ الْحَلِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laahul a’zeemul haleemo

translation.en: There is no god but Allah, the Great, the Clement.

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيْمُ
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho rabbul a’rshil kareemo

translation.en: There is no god but Allah, the Lord of the throne of Grace.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْن
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahe rabbil a’alameen.

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, the Lord of the worlds

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ مُوْجِبَاتِ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka moojebaate rahmateka

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You for all that which is the cause of Your Mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ عَزَآئِمَ مَغْفِرَتِكَ وَ الْغَنِيْمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ بِرٍّ
segments.transliteration: wa a’zaa-ema maghferateka wal ghaneemata min kulle birrin

translation.en: and that which ascertains Your Forgiveness; and benefit from every virtue,

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ اِثْمٍ
segments.transliteration: as salaamata min kulle ismin

translation.en: and safety from every sin.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَدَعْ لِيْ ذَنْبًا اِلَّا غَفَرْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma laa tada’ lee zanban illaa ghafartahu

translation.en: O Allah! Leave not any sin for me but that You forgive it

segments.arabic: وَ لَا هَمًّا اِلَّا فَرَّجْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa laa hamman illaa farrajtahu

translation.en: any affliction but that You remove it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا سُقْمًا اِلَّا شَفَيْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa laa suqman illaa shafaytahu

translation.en: any illness but that You heal it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا عَيْبًا اِلَّا سَتَرْتَه
segments.transliteration: wa laa a’yban illaa satartahu

translation.en: any defect but that You conceal it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا رِزْقًا اِلَّا بَسَطْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa laa rizqan illaa basat-tahu

translation.en: any sustenance but that You increase it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا خَوْفًا اِلَّا آمَنْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa laa khawfan illaa aamantahu

translation.en: any fear but that You protect (me) from it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا سُوْءً اِلَّا صَرَفْتَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa laa soooan illaa saraftahu

translation.en: any evil but that You repel it,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا حَاجَةً هِيَ لَكَ رِضًا
segments.transliteration: wa laa haajatan heya laka rezan

translation.en: and any of my needs in which is Your pleasure

segments.arabic: وَ لِيَ فِيْهَا صَلاَحٌ اِلَّا قَضَيْتَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa leya feehaa salaahun illaa qazaytahaa

translation.en: and which is beneficial for me, but that You grant it;

segments.arabic: يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ آمِيْنَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: aameena rabbal yaa arhamar raahemeena a’alameena

translation.en: O Most Merciful! Grant me my supplication, Lord of the Universe.

text.en: Fifty two 52. His Dua After Every Two Rak'ahs Of The Naafelah Of Zohr

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اَكْرَمُ مَاْتِيٍّ وَ اَكْرَمُ مَزُوْراَللّٰهُمَّ ٍ
segments.transliteration: anta akramo maatiyyin wa akramo mazooriallaahumma

translation.en: O Allah! You are the most Noble One Who is approached, the most Magnanimous Who is visited,

segments.arabic: وَ خَيْرُ مَنْ طُلِبَتْ اِلَيْهِ الْحَاجَاتُ
segments.transliteration: wa khayro man tolebat elayhil haajaato

translation.en: the best One from Whom fulfillment of desires is sought

segments.arabic: وَ اَجْوَدُ مَنْ اَعْطٰى وَ اَرْحَمُ مَنِ اسْتُرْحَمَ
segments.transliteration: ajwado man a-a’taa wa arhamo manis turhama

translation.en: the most Generous in giving, the most Merciful of those Who show mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ اَرْاَفُ مَنْ عَفَا وَ اَعَزُّ مَنِ اعْتُمِدَ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ar-afo man a’faa wa a-a’zzo mane’ tomeda a’layhe.

translation.en: the most Compassionate of those Who forgive and the most Glorious of those Who are relied upon.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِيْاِلَيْكَ فَاقَۃٌ وَ لِيْ اِلَيْكَ حَاجَاتٌ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma bee elayka faktaw wa li elayl haajaatun

translation.en: O Allah! I am needy of You, I have desires that I wish You to fulfill

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ عِنْدِيْ طَلِبَاتٌ مِنْ ذُنُوْبٍ اَنَا بِهَا مُرْتَهَنٌ
segments.transliteration: wa laka i’ndee talebaatun min zonoobin anaa behaa murtahanun

translation.en: and I have an obligation to You because of the sins

segments.arabic: وَ قَدْ اَوْقَرَتْ ظَهْرِيْ وَ اَوْبَقَتْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa qad awqarat zahree wa aw-baqatnee

translation.en: that have broken my back and debased me,

segments.arabic: وَ اِلَّتَرْحَمْنِيْا
segments.transliteration: wa illaa tarhamnee

translation.en: and if You don't have mercy on me

segments.arabic: وَ تَغْفِرْ لِيْ اَكُنْ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِيْن
segments.transliteration: wa taghfir lee akun menal khaasereen

translation.en: and forgive me I will surely be from the losers.

segments.arabic: ااَللّٰهُمَّ اَللّٰهُمَّ عْتَمَدْتُكَ فِيْهَا تَائِبًا اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma’ tamadtoka feehaa taa-eban elayka

translation.en: O Allah! I rely on You and turn to You,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: fasalle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: so send Your blessings on Muhammad and his progeny,

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيْ ذُنُوْبِيْ كُلَّهَا قَدِيْمَهَا
segments.transliteration: wagh fir lee zonoobee kullahaa qadeemahaa

translation.en: and forgive all my sins, of past

segments.arabic: وَ حَدِيْثَهَا سِرَّهَا وَ عَلَانِيَتَهَا خَطَاَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa hadeesahaa sirrahaa wa a’laaneyatahaa khataahaa

translation.en: and present, (those done) in secret and in the open, by mistake

segments.arabic: وَ عَمْدَهَا صَغِيْرَهَا وَ كَبِيْرَهَا
segments.transliteration: wa a’mdahaa sagheerahaa wa kabeerahaa

translation.en: or on purpose, small and great,

segments.arabic: وَ كُلَّ ذَنْبٍ اَذْنَبْتُهٗ وَ اَنَا مُذْنِبُهٗ مَغْفِرَةً
segments.transliteration: wa kulla zanbin aznabtohu wa anaa muznebohu mahgferatan

translation.en: and all the sins that I have performed and I am a perpetrator of – a forgiving that wipes off completely,

segments.arabic: جَزْمًا لَا تُغَادِرُ ذَنْبًا وَاحِدًا
segments.transliteration: jazman laa toghaadero zanban waahedan

translation.en: not leaving a single sin;

segments.arabic: وَ لَا اَكْتَسِبُ بَعْدَهَا مُحَرَّمًا اَبَدًا
segments.transliteration: wa laa aktasebo ba’dahaa moharraman abadan

translation.en: and after which I will never perform that which is prohibited.

segments.arabic: وَ اقْبَلْ مِنِّيْ الْيَسِيْرَ مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: waq bal minnil yaseera min taa-a’teka

translation.en: And accept my little good acts of worship while overlooking

segments.arabic: وَ تَجَاوَزْ لِيْ عَنِ الْكَبِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa tajaawaz lee a’nil kabeere

translation.en: except the Great One my great disobedience of Your commands.

segments.arabic: ظِيْمُ اِنَّهٗ لَا يَغْفِرُ الْعَظِيْمَيَا عَ يَا مِنْ مَعْصِيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: yaa min ma’seyateka a’zeemo innahu laa yaghferul a’zeema

translation.en: O Great One! None can forgive the great sins

segments.arabic: اِلَّا الْعَظِيْمُ يَسْئَلُهٗ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: illal a’zeemo yas-alohu man fis samaawaate

translation.en: who are in the heavens

segments.arabic: وَ الْاَرْضِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِي شَاْنٍ
segments.transliteration: wal arze kulla yawmin howa fee shaanin

translation.en: and earth ask from Him every moment

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ
segments.transliteration: yaa man howa kulla yawmin

translation.en: One who is in a state of Glory every day!

segments.arabic: فِي شَاْنٍ صَلِّ وَ آلِعَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ هٖ
segments.transliteration: fee shaanin salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: Send blessings on Muhammad and his progeny,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لِيْ فِيْ شَاْنِكَ شَاْنَ حَاجَتِيْ
segments.transliteration: waj a’l lee fee shaaneka shaana haajatee

translation.en: and place my desire in Your Glory,

segments.arabic: وَ حَاجَتِيْ هِيَ فَكَاكُ رَقَبَتِيْ مِنَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa haajatee heya fakaako raqabatee menan naare

translation.en: and my desire is freedom from the fire of hell

segments.arabic: وَ الْاَمَانُ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: wal amaano min sakhateka

translation.en: safety from Your wrath

segments.arabic: وَ الْفَوْزُ بِرِضْوَانِكَ وَ جَنَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wal fawzo be-rizwaaneka wa jannateka

translation.en: and prosperity with Your pleasure and Your paradise;

segments.arabic: وَ امْنُنْ بِذٰلِكَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wam nun be-zaaleka a’layya

translation.en: and bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ بِكُلِّ مَا فِيْهِ صَلَاحِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa be-kulle maa feehe salaahee

translation.en: and grant me by this whatever is good for me.

segments.arabic: بِنُوْرِكَ السَّاطِعِ فِي الظُّلُمَاتِ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka benoorekas saate-e’ fiz zolomaate

translation.en: I ask You by Your light that radiates in the darkness

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَعَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
segments.transliteration: an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin

translation.en: that you bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُفَرِّقْ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَهُمْ فِي الدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa laa tofarriq baynee wa baynahum fid dunyaa

translation.en: and do not separate me from them in this world

segments.arabic: كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ وَ الْآخِرَةِ اِنَّكَ عَلٰى
segments.transliteration: wal aakherate innaka a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer.

translation.en: and the hereafter, indeed You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اكْتُبْ لِيْ عِتْقًا مِنَ النَّارِ مَبْتُوْلًا
segments.transliteration: allah humma waktob li itka min-naare mabtula

translation.en: O Allah! Destine for me freedom from the fire of hell once and for all

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ مِنَ الْمُنِيْبِيْنَ اِلَيْكَ التَّابِعِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: waj a’lnee menal moneebeena elaykat taa-be-e’ena

translation.en: and make me from among those who are repentant, those who follow

segments.arabic: لِاَمْرِكَ الْمُخْبِتِيْنَ الَّذِيْنَ اِذَا ذُكِرْتَ
segments.transliteration: le-amrekal mukhbeteenal lazeena ezaa zokirta

translation.en: your commandments, the humble ones whose hearts tremble with fear when You are mentioned,

segments.arabic: وَجِلَتْ قُلُوْبُهُمْ وَ الْمُسْتَكْمِلِيْنَ مَنَاسِكَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wajelat qoloobohum wal mustakmeleena manaasekahum

translation.en: those who have completed their Noble rites,

segments.arabic: وَ الصَّابِرِيْنَ فِي الْبَلَاءِ وَ الشَّاكِرِيْنفِي الرَّخَاءِ
segments.transliteration: was saabereena fil balaa-e wash shaakereena fir rakhaae

translation.en: the ones who are patient in the face of trials,the ones who are thankful when in comfort

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُطِيْعِيْنَ لِاَمْرِكَ فِيْمَا اَمَرْتَهُمْ بِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wal motee-e’ena le-amreka feemaa amartahum behi

translation.en: the ones who obey Your commandments in whatever You command them,

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُقِيْمِيْنَ الصَّلَاةَ وَ الْمُؤْتِيْنَ الزَّكَاة
segments.transliteration: wal moqeemeenas salaata wal moateenaz zakaata

translation.en: the ones who establish the prayer, pay the poor-rate

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُتَوَكِّلِيْنَ عَلَيْكَ.
segments.transliteration: wal motawakkeleena a’layka.

translation.en: and those who put their trust in You

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَضْعِفْنِيْ يَا كَرِيْمُ كَرَامَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma az-e’efnee yaa kareemo karaamataka

translation.en: O Allah! Double for me, O Munificent, Your Munificence,

segments.arabic: وَ اَجْزِلْ لِيْ عَطِيَّتَكَ وَ الْفَضِيْلَةَ لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ajzil lee a’tiyyataka wal fazeelata ladayka

translation.en: and make abundant for me your blessings virtues and comforts,

segments.arabic: وَ الرَّاحَةَ مِنْكَ وَ الْوَسِيْلَةَ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: war raahata minka wal waseelata elayka

translation.en: and intermediaries to You

segments.arabic: وَ الْمَنْزِلَةَ عِنْدَكَ مَا تَكْفِيْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wal manzelata i’ndaka maa takfeenee

translation.en: and a status before You and make this enough for me

segments.arabic: بِهٖ كُلَّ هَوْلٍ دُوْنَ الْجَنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: behi kulla hawlin doonal jannate

translation.en: in the face of all terrors; apart from paradise.

segments.arabic: وَ تُظِلُّنِيْ فِي ظِلِّ عَرْشِكَ يَوْمَ
segments.transliteration: wa tozillanee fee zille a’rsheka yawma

translation.en: And shade me with the shade of Your Power on the day

segments.arabic: لَا ظِلَّ اِلَّا ظِلُّكَ وَ تُعَظِّمُ نُوْرِيْ
segments.transliteration: laa zilla illaa zilloka wa to-a’zzemo nooree

translation.en: when there will be no shade but Yours; and make my light bright,

segments.arabic: وَ تُعْطِيْنِيْ كِتَابِيْ بِيَمِيْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa to’teenee ketaabee be-yameenee

translation.en: and give my book to me in my right hand,

segments.arabic: وَ تَحْشُرُنِيْ وَ تُضْعِفُ حَسَنَاتِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa tuz-e’fo hasanaatee wa tahshoronee

translation.en: and multiply my good deeds, and raise me among

segments.arabic: فِيْ اَفْضَلِ الْوَافِدِيْنَ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: fee afzalil waafedeena elayka

translation.en: the best groups of the pious ones

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْمُتَّقِيْنَ وَ تُسْكِنَنِيْ فِيْ
segments.transliteration: menal muttaqeena wa tuskenonee fee

translation.en: and make me stay among the lofty ones, and make me

segments.arabic: عِلِّيِّيْنَ وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ مِمَّنْ تَنْظُرُ
segments.transliteration: i’lliyyeena waj a’lnee mimman tanzoro

translation.en: from those whom You look at

segments.arabic: اِلَيْهِ بِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيْمِ وَ تَتَوَفَّانِيْ
segments.transliteration: elayhe be-wajhekal kareeme wa tatawaffaanee

translation.en: with Your Graciousness, and take my soul

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ عَنِّيْ رَاضٍ
segments.transliteration: wa anta a’nnee raazin

translation.en: while You are pleased with me

segments.arabic: وَ اَلْحِقْنِيْ بِعِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa alhiqnee be-e’baadekas saaleheena.

translation.en: and make me join Your good servants.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: O Allah! Bless Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ اقْلِبْنِيْ بِذٰلِكَ كُلِّهٖ مُفْلِحًا
segments.transliteration: waq bilnee be-zaaleka kullehi muflehan

translation.en: and transform me with success and prosperity,

segments.arabic: مُنْجِحًا قَدْ غَفَرْتَ لِيْ خَطَايَايَ
segments.transliteration: munjehan qad ghafarta lee khataayaaya

translation.en: having forgiven all my mistakes

segments.arabic: وَ ذُنُوْبِيْ كُلَّهَا وَ كَفَّرْتَ عَنِّيْ سَيِّئَاتِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa zonoobee kullahaa wa kaffarta a’nnee sayye-aatee

translation.en: and sins, and wiped off my evil deeds,

segments.arabic: وَ حَطَطْتَ عَنِّيْ وِزْرِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa hatatta a’nnee wizree

translation.en: and removed my burden,

segments.arabic: وَ شَفَّعْتَنِيْ فِيْ جَمِيْعِ حَوَائِجِيْ فِي الدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa shaffa’tanee fee jamee-a’ hawaa-ejee fid dunyaa

translation.en: and having granted all my needs in this world

segments.arabic: وَ الْآخِرَةِ فِيْ يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَ عَافِيَةٍ.
segments.transliteration: wal aakherate fee yusrin minka wa a’afeyatin.

translation.en: and the hereafter, in comfort and health.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: O Allah! Bless Muhammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَخْلُطْ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عَمَلِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa laa takhlut be-shayin min a’malee

translation.en: and do not mix any of my actions,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا بِمَا تَقَرَّبْتُ بِهٖ اِلَيْكَ رِيَاءً
segments.transliteration: wa laa bemaa taqarrabto behi elayka reyaa-an

translation.en: with which I sought to become close to You,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا سُمْعَةً وَ لَا اَشِرًا وَ لَا بَطِرًا
segments.transliteration: wa laa sum-a’tan wa laa asharan wa laa bataran

translation.en: with the intention of being seen or heard by people thereby becoming proud and arrogant,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ مِنَ الْخَاشِعِيْنَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: waj a’lnee menal khaashe-e’ena laka.

translation.en: and make me from among those who are submissive to You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: O Allah! Bless Muhammad and his progeny,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعْطِنِي السَّعَةَ فِيْ رِزْقِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa a-a’tenis sa-a’ta fee rizqee

translation.en: and grant me abundance in my sustenance,

segments.arabic: وَ الصِّحَّةَ فِيْ جِسْمِيْ
segments.transliteration: was sehhata fee jismee

translation.en: and good health in my body,

segments.arabic: بَدَنِيْ عَلٰى طَاعَتِكَ وَ الْقُوَّةَ فِيْ
segments.transliteration: wal quwwata fee badanee a’laa ta-a’teka

translation.en: and physical strength with which I can worship

segments.arabic: وَ عِبَادَتِكَ وَ اَعْطِنِيْ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa e’baadateka wa a-a’tenee min rahmateka

translation.en: and obey You; and bestow on me from Your Mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ رِضْوَانِكَ وَ عَافِيَتِكَ مَا تُسَلِّمُنِيْ بِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa rizwaaneka wa a’afeyateka maa tosallemonee behi

translation.en: Pleasure and Well-Being, that which will keep me safe

segments.arabic: مِنْ كُلِّ بَلَاءِ الْآخِرَةِ وَ الدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: min kulle balaa-il aakherate wad dunyaa

translation.en: from all the trials of the hereafter and this world;

segments.arabic: وَ ارْزُقْنِي الرَّهْبَةَ مِنْكَ وَ الرَّغْبَةَ اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: war zuqnir rahbata minka war raghbata elayka

translation.en: and grant me fear of You, inclination towards You,

segments.arabic: وَ الْخُشُوْعَ لَكَ وَ الْوَقَارَ وَ الْحَيَاءَ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wal khoshoo-a’ laka wal waqaara wal hayaa-a minka

translation.en: submission to You, dignity and bashfulness from You,

segments.arabic: وَ التَّعْظِيْمَ لِذِكْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wat ta’zeema le-zikreka

translation.en: respect for Your remembrance,

segments.arabic: وَ التَّقْدِيْسَ لِمَجْدِكَ اَيَّامَ حَيَاتِيحَتّٰى تَتَوَفَّانِيْ
segments.transliteration: wat taqdeesa lemajdeka ayyaama hayaateehattaa tatawafaanee

translation.en: sanctity for Your Magnificence – all the days of my life, until You take my soul

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ عَنِّيْ رَاضٍ
segments.transliteration: wa anta a’nnee raazin.

translation.en: while You are pleased with me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ وَ اَسْاَلُكَ السَّعَةَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma wa as-alokas sa-a’ta

translation.en: O Allah! I ask you for abundance

segments.arabic: وَ الدَّعَةَ وَ الْاَمْنَ وَ الْكِفَايَةَ
segments.transliteration: wad’da-a’ta wal amna wal kefaayata

translation.en: and equanimity, security and sufficiency,

segments.arabic: وَ السَّلَامَةَ وَ الصِّحَّةَ وَ الْقُنُوْعَ
segments.transliteration: was salaamata was sehhata wal qonoo-a

translation.en: soundness and health, contentment

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَفْوَ وَ الْعِصْمَةَ وَ الْهُدٰى وَ الرَّحْمَةَ
segments.transliteration: wal i’smata wal hodaa war rahmata ’ wal a’fwa

translation.en: and modesty, guidance and mercy, forgiveness

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَافِيَةَ وَ الْيَقِيْنَ وَ الْمَغْفِرَة
segments.transliteration: wal aafiyata wal yakeen wal magferat

translation.en: and well-being, certitude and pardon,

segments.arabic: وَ الشُّكْرَ وَ الرِّضَا وَ الصَّبْرَ
segments.transliteration: wash shukra war rezaa was sabra

translation.en: gratitude and pleasure and patience,

segments.arabic: وَ الْعِلْمَ وَ الصِّدْقَ وَ الْبِرَّ
segments.transliteration: wal i’lma was sidqa wal birra

translation.en: knowledge and truth, goodness

segments.arabic: وَ التَّقْوٰى وَ الْحِلْمَ وَ التَّوَاضُعَ
segments.transliteration: wat taqwaa wal hilma wat tawaa-zo-a’

translation.en: and piety, clemency and humility,

segments.arabic: وَ الْيُسْرَ وَ التَّوْفِيْقَ.
segments.transliteration: wal yusra wat tawfeeqa.

translation.en: ease and inspiration (to do good).

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: O Allah! Bless Muhammad and his progeny,

segments.arabic: وَ اعْصِمْ بِذٰلِكَ اَهْلَ بَيْتِيْ وَ قُرُبَاتِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa’ sim be-zaaleka ahla baytee wa qorobaatee

translation.en: and protect, by this, my family, close relatives,

segments.arabic: وَ اِخْوَانِيْ فِيْكَ وَ مَنْ اَحْبَبْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa ikhwaanee feeka wa man ahbabto

translation.en: my brothers in faith and the ones whom I love and

segments.arabic: وَ اَحَبَّنِيْ فِيْكَ اَوْ وَلَّيْتُهٗ وَ
segments.transliteration: wa ahabbanee feeka aw wallaytohu wa

translation.en: who love me for Your sake,

segments.arabic: وَلَدَنِيْ مِنْ جَمِيْعِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
segments.transliteration: waladanee min jamee-i’l moameneena wal moamenaate

translation.en: from all the believing men and women.

segments.arabic: وَ الْمُسْلِمِيْنَ وَ الْمُسْلِمَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wal muslemeena wal muslemaate.

translation.en: from all Muslim men and women

segments.arabic: رَبِّ حُسْالظَّنِّ بِكَ وَ الصِّدْقَ فِيْ التَّوَكُّلِ عَلَيْكوَ اَسْاَلُكَ يَا َن
segments.transliteration: rabbe husnaz zanne beka was sidqa fit tawakkolea’laykaw aslaka yaan

translation.en: And I ask You, my Lord, to make me think positively of You and for the ability to trust You entirely;

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ اَنْ تَبْتَلِيَنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka yaa rabbe an tabtaleyanee

translation.en: and I seek protection with You from any trial

segments.arabic: بِبَلِيَّةٍ تَحْمِلُنِيْ ضَرُوْرَتُهَا عَلَى التَّغَوُّثِ
segments.transliteration: be-baliyyatin tahmelonee zarooratohaa a’lat ta- ghawwose

translation.en: you test me with which I am unable to bear

segments.arabic: بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ مَعَاصِيْكَ
segments.transliteration: be-shay-in min ma-a’aseeka

translation.en: and thus turn to sin;

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ اَنْ اَكُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka yaa rabbe an akoona

translation.en: and I seek protection with You, my Lord, from ever

segments.arabic: فِيْ حَالِ عُسْرٍ اَوْ يُسْرٍ اَظُنُّ
segments.transliteration: fee haale u’srin aw yusrin azunno

translation.en: whether in difficulty or ease

segments.arabic: اَنَّ مَعَاصِيَكَ اَنْجَحُ فِيْ طَلِبَتِيْ مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: anna ma-a’aseyaka anjaho fee talebatee min taa-a’teka

translation.en: – thinking that sinning will be more beneficial for my cause than obeying You;

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ تَكَلُّفِوَ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min takallofe

translation.en: and I seek protection with You from exceeding the limits

segments.arabic: مَا لَمْ تُقَدِّرْ لِيْ فِيْهِ رِزْقًا
segments.transliteration: maa lam toqaddir lee feehe rizqan

translation.en: which You have not destined for me

segments.arabic: وَ مَا قَدَّرْتَ لِيْ مِنْ رِزْقٍ
segments.transliteration: wa maa qaddarta lee min rizqin

translation.en: and the sustenance which You have destined for me;

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ وَ آتِنِيْ بِهٖ
segments.transliteration: fasalle a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi wa aatenee behi

translation.en: so send Your blessings on Muhammad and his progeny

segments.arabic: فِيْ يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَ عَافِيَةٍ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: fee yusrin minka wa a’afeyatin yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: and give me of it in ease and well-being O Most Merciful of mercifuls.

text.en: Fifty 53. His Dua After The Fajr

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَ الْحُزْنِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka menal hamme wal huzne

translation.en: O Allah! I seek protection with You from grief and sorrow,

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَجْزِ وَ الْكَسَلِ وَ الْبُخْل
segments.transliteration: wal a’jze wal kasale wal bukhle

translation.en: weakness and laziness, miserliness

segments.arabic: وَ الْجُبْنِ وَ ضَلْعِ الدَّيْنِ
segments.transliteration: wal jubne wa zal-i’d dayne

translation.en: and cowardice,turning away from the truth

segments.arabic: وَ غَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ وَ بَوَارِ الْاَيَّمِ
segments.transliteration: wa ghalabatir rejaale wa bawaaril ayyaame

translation.en: and idle talk of men, wasting time and negligence,

segments.arabic: وَ الْغَفْلَةِ وَ الذِّلَّةِ وَ الْقَسْوَةِ
segments.transliteration: wal ghaflate waz zillate wal qaswate

translation.en: vileness and cruelty, destitution and poverty.

segments.arabic: وَ الْعَيْلَةِ وَ الْمَسْكَنَةِ
segments.transliteration: wal a’ylate wal maskanate

translation.en: and the family and the home

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لَا تَشْبَعُ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min nafsin laa tashba-o’

translation.en: And I seek protection with You from the self that never gets satisfied,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ
segments.transliteration: wa min qalbin laa yakhsha-o’

translation.en: the heart that does not humble itself,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ عَيْنٍ لَا تَدْمَعُ وَ مِنْ دُعَاءٍ لَا يُسْمَع
segments.transliteration: wa min a’ynin laa tadma-o’ wa min do-a’a-in laa yusma-o’

translation.en: the eye that does not shed tears, the supplication that is not heard,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ صَلَاةٍ لَا تَنْفَع
segments.transliteration: wa min salaatin laa tanfa-o’

translation.en: the prayer that does not benefit.

segments.arabic: تُرْفَعُ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنِ امْرَاَةٍ تُشَيِّبُنِيْ قَبْلَ اَوَانَ
segments.transliteration: turfa-o’ wa a-o’ozo beka menim ra-atin toshayyebonee qabla awaana

translation.en: And I seek protection with You from a woman who makes me old before my time

segments.arabic: مَشِيْبِيْ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَلَدٍ يَكُوْنُ عَلَيَّ رِبًّا
segments.transliteration: masheebee wa a-o’ozo beka min waladin yakoono a’layya ribban

translation.en: and I seek protection with You from a son who subjugates me,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ مَالٍ يَكُوْنُ عَلَيَّ عَذَابًا
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min maalin yakoono a’layya a’zaaban

translation.en: and I seek protection with You from wealth that is a torment for me,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ صَاحِبِ خَدِيْعَةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min saahebe khadee-a’tin

translation.en: and I seek protection from the deceiver

segments.arabic: اِنْ رَاَى حَسَنَةٍ دَفَنَهَا
segments.transliteration: in ra-ay hasanatin da-fa-nahaa

translation.en: who conceals any good that he sees

segments.arabic: وَ اِنْ رَاَىْ سَيِّئَةً اَفْشَاهَا
segments.transliteration: wa in ra-ay sayye-atan afshaahaa.

translation.en: and propagates any evil that he sees.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْ لِفَاجِرٍ عَلَيَّ عِنْدِيْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma laa taj-a’l le-faajerin a’layya (i’ndee)

translation.en: O Allah! Do not let an insolent one ever do me a favor

segments.arabic: يَدًا وَ لَا مِنَّةً.
segments.transliteration: yadan wa laa minnatan.

translation.en: and do not make him expect anything from me.

text.en: Fifty four 54. His Dua On The First Night Of Ramazan

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ اَكْرَمَنِيْ بِكَ اَيُّهَا الشَّهْرُ الْمُبَارَكُ
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahil lazee akramanee beka ayyohash shahrul mobaarako

translation.en: All praise is for Allah, the One Who honored me by you, O Blessed Month!

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ فَقَوِّنَا عَلٰى صِيَامِنَا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma faqawwenaa a’laa seyaamenaa

translation.en: O Allah! Make us successful in our fasts

segments.arabic: وَ قِيَامِنَا وَ ثَبِّتْ اَقْدَامَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa qeyaamenaa wa sabbit aqdaamanaa

translation.en: and prayers,and keep us steadfast

segments.arabic: وَ انْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wan surnaa a’lal qawmil kaafereen.

translation.en: and help us against the disbelievers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَنْتَ الْوَاحِدُ فَلَا وَلَدَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma antal waahedo falaa walada laka

translation.en: O Allah! You are the One and has no son;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الصَّمَدُ فَلَا شِبْهَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antas samado falaa shibha laka

translation.en: and You are the Unique Whom none is similar to;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْعَزِيْزُ فَلَا يُعِزُّكَ شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: wa antal a’zeezo falaa yo-i’zzoka shay-un

translation.en: and You are the Mighty and nothing makes You mighty.

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْغَنِيُّ وَ اَنَا الْفَقِيْرُ
segments.transliteration: wa antal ghaniyyo wa anal faqeero

translation.en: You are the Wealthy and I am the poor;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْمَوْلٰى وَ اَنَا الْعَبْدُ
segments.transliteration: wa antal mawlaa wa anal a’bdo

translation.en: You are the Master and I am the slave;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْغَفُوْرُ وَ اَنَا الْمُذْنِبُ
segments.transliteration: wa antal ghafooro wa anal muznebo

translation.en: You are the Forgiving and I am the sinner;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الرَّحِيْمُ وَ اَنَا الْمُخْطِئُ
segments.transliteration: wa antar raheemo wa anal mukhte-o

translation.en: You are the Merciful and I am at fault;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْخَالِقُ وَ اَنَا الْمَخْلُوْقُ
segments.transliteration: wa antal khaaleqo wa anal makhlooqo

translation.en: You are the Creator and I am the creation;

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْحَيُّ وَ اَنَا الْمَيِّتُ
segments.transliteration: wa antal hayyo wa anal mayyeto.

translation.en: You are Living and I am dead;

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ اَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِيْ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka be-rahmateka an taghfera lee

translation.en: I beseech You, out of Your Mercy, to forgive me

segments.arabic: وَ تَرْحَمَنِيْ وَ تَجَاوَزْ عَنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: wa tarhamanee wa tajaawaz a’nnee

translation.en: and have mercy on me and overlook my sins,

segments.arabic: اِنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْر
segments.transliteration: innaka a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer

translation.en: surely You have power over all things.

text.en: Fifty 55. His Dua In The Morning And Evening

segments.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّۃَ
segments.transliteration: laa hawla wa laa quwwata

translation.en: 'There is no power and no might

segments.arabic: اِلَّا بِاللهِ وَ لَا مَنْجَأَ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: illaa billaahe wa laa manja-a minka

translation.en: but Allah' and 'There is no security

segments.arabic: اِلَّا اِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: illaa elayka

translation.en: from You but with You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّ ظُلْمِيْ اَصْبَحَ مُسْتَجِيْرًا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma inna zulmee asbaha mustajeran

translation.en: O Allah! My oppression has sought refuge in Your Forgiveness,

segments.arabic: بِعَفْوِكَ وَ ذَنْبِيْ اَصْبَحَ
segments.transliteration: be-a’fweka wa zanbee asbaha

translation.en: and my sin has sought refuge

segments.arabic: مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: mustajeeran be-maghferateka

translation.en: in Your Pardon,

segments.arabic: وَ ذُلِّيْ اَصْبَحَ مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِعِزَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa zullee asbaha mustajeeran be-i’zzateka

translation.en: my lowliness has sought refuge with Your Greatness,

segments.arabic: وَ فَقْرِيْاَصْبَحَ مُسْتَجِيْرًا
segments.transliteration: wa faqree asbaha mustajeeran

translation.en: my poverty has sought refuge in Your Wealth,

segments.arabic: وَ وَجْهِيَ الْبَالِيَ الْفَانِيَ
segments.transliteration: wa wajheyal baaleyal faaneya

translation.en: my transient existence has sought refuge

segments.arabic: بِوَجْهِكَ الدَّائِمِ الْبَاقِي الَّذِيْ لَا يَفْنٰى.
segments.transliteration: be-wajhekad daa-emil baaqil lazee laa yafnaa.

translation.en: in Your Everlasting Existence that never perishes.

text.en: Fifty 56. His Dua at Sunrise

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَمْسٰى ظُلْمِيْ مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِعَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma amsaa zulmee mustajeeran be-a’fweka

translation.en: O Allah! The day has come while my oppression has sought refuge in Your Forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَ اَمْسَتْ ذُنُوْبِيْ مُسْتَجِيْرَةً بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa amsat zonoobee mustajeeratan be-maghferateka

translation.en: and my sins have sought refuge in Your Pardon,

segments.arabic: وَ اَمْسٰى خَوْفِيْ مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِاَمْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa amsaa khawfee mustajeeran be-amneka

translation.en: my fear has sought refuge in Your Security,

segments.arabic: وَ اَمْسٰى ضَعْفِيْ مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِقُوَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa amsaa za’fee mustajeeran be-quwwateka

translation.en: my weakness has sought refuge in Your Strength

segments.arabic: وَ اَمْسٰى وَجْهِيَ الْبَالِيَ الْفَانِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa amsaa wajheyal baaleyal faanee

translation.en: and my transient existence has

segments.arabic: مُسْتَجِيْرًا بِوَجْهِكَ الدَّائِمِ الْبَاقِيْ
segments.transliteration: mustajeeran be-wajhekad daa-emil baaqee

translation.en: sought refuge in Your Everlasting Existence.

segments.arabic: اَلْبِسْنِيْ عَافِيَتَكَ وَ غَشِّنِيْ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: albisnee a’afeyataka wa ghashshenee be-rahmateka

translation.en: Grant me well-being, and cover me with Your Mercy,

segments.arabic: وَ جَلِّلْنِيْ كَرَامَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jallilnee karaamataka

translation.en: and honor me with Your Nobleness

segments.arabic: وَ قِنِيْ شَرَّ خَلْقِكَ مِنَ الْجِنِّ
segments.transliteration: wa qenee sharra khalqeka menal jinne

translation.en: and keep me safe from the evil of Your creation, from the jinn

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِنْسِ يَا اَللهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيْمُ.
segments.transliteration: wal inse yaa allaaho yaa rahmaano yaa raheemo.

translation.en: and man. O Allah! O Compassionate! O Merciful!

text.en: Fifty 57. From His Common Supplications

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ اَظْهَرَ الْجَمِيْلَ
segments.transliteration: yaa man azharal jameela

translation.en: O One Who reveals the beautiful (deeds)

segments.arabic: وَ سَتَرَ الْقَبِيْحَ يَا مَنْ لَمْ يَهْتِكِ السِّتْرَ
segments.transliteration: wa sataral qabeeha yaa man lam yahtekis sitra

translation.en: and conceals the ugly (actions)! O One Who did not expose the secret

segments.arabic: وَ لَمْ يُؤَاخِذْ بِالْجَرِيْرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yoaakhiz bil-jareerate

translation.en: and did not punish the offence!

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيْمَ الْعَفْوِ يَا حَسَنَ التَّجَاوُزِ
segments.transliteration: yaa a’zeemal a’fwe yaa hasanat tajaawoze

translation.en: O Most Forgiving! O Best Excuser!

segments.arabic: يَا وَاسِعَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ يَا بَاسِطَ الْيَدَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: yaa waase-a’l maghferate yaa baasetal yadayne

translation.en: O Great Pardoner! O One Whose hands are open

segments.arabic: بِالرَّحْمَةِ يَا صَاحِبَ كُلِّ
segments.transliteration: bir-rahmate yaa saaheba kulle

translation.en: with mercy! O Hearer of all

segments.arabic: وَ مُنْتَهٰى كُلِّ شَكْوٰى يَا مُقِيْلَ الْعَثَرَاتِ
segments.transliteration: najwaa wa muntahaa kulle shakwaa yaa moqeelal a’saraate

translation.en: whisperings! O One to Whom all complaints are made!

segments.arabic: يَا كَرِيْمَ الصَّفْحِ يَا عَظِيْمَ الْمَنِّ
segments.transliteration: yaa kareemas safhe yaa a’zeemal manne

translation.en: O Most Excellent in forgiving! O Great Bestower of bounties!

segments.arabic: يَا مُبْتَدِئًا بِالنِّعَمِ قَبْلَ اسْتِحْقَاقِهَا
segments.transliteration: yaa mubtade-an bin-ne-a’me qablas tehqaaqehaa

translation.en: O Giver of blessings before they are deserved!

segments.arabic: يَا اَمَلَاهُ يَا رَبَّاهُ يَا سَيِّدَاهُ
segments.transliteration: yaa rabbaaho yaa sayyedaaho yaa amalaaho

translation.en: O Lord! O Master! O Guardian!

segments.arabic: يَا غَايَةَ رَغْبَتَاهُ
segments.transliteration: yaa ghaayata raghbataaho.

translation.en: O Goal of (my) desires!

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِكَ يَا اَللهُ اَنْ لَا تُشَوِّهَ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka beka yaa allaaho an laa toshawweha

translation.en: Beseech You, O Allah! Not to disfigure me

segments.arabic: خَلْقِيْ بِالنَّارِ وَ اَنْ تَقْضِيَ لِيْ
segments.transliteration: khalqee bin-naare wa an taqzeya lee

translation.en: with the fire of hell, and to fulfill my desires

segments.arabic: حَوَائِجَ آخِرَتِيْ وَ دُنْيَايَ وَ تَفْعَلَ بِيْ كَذَا
segments.transliteration: hawaa-eja aakheratee wa dunyaaya wa taf-a’la bee kazaa

translation.en: of the hereafter and this world, and do such-

segments.arabic: وَ كَذَا وَ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa kazaa wa tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aale mohammadin.

translation.en: -and-such for me and send Your Blessings on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahe rabbil a’alameen.

translation.en: Praise be to Allah, Lord of the universe."

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيْم
segments.transliteration: bismil laahir rahmaanir raheem..

translation.en: In the name of Allah, the Compassionate, the Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ يَا اَللهُ يَا اَللهُ يَا اَللهُ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka yaa allaaho yaa allaaho

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You. O Allah! O Allah!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عَلَا فَقَهَرَ وَ يَا مَنْ بَطَنَ فَخَبَرَ
segments.transliteration: yaa man a’laa faqahara wa yaa man batana fa-khabara

translation.en: O He Who is exalted and dominates! O He Who is hidden and aware!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ مَلَكَ فَقَدَرَ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa man malaka fa-qadara

translation.en: O He Who is the master and exercises power!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ عُبِدَ فَشَكَرَ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa man o’beda fashakara

translation.en: O He Who is worshipped and rewards!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ عُصِىَ فَغَفَرَ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa man o’seya fa-ghafara

translation.en: O He Who is disobeyed and forgives!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُحِيْطُ بِهِ الْفِكَرُ
segments.transliteration: yaa man laa yoheeto behil fekaro

translation.en: O He Who is not comprehended by thought!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُدْرِكُهٗ بَصَرُ
segments.transliteration: yaa man laa yudrekohu basaro

translation.en: O He Who is not perceived by vision!

segments.arabic: وَ يَا مَنْ لَا يَخْفٰى عَلَيْهِ اَثَرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa yaa man laa yakhfaa a’layhe asarun

translation.en: O He from Whom no trace remains hidden!

segments.arabic: يَا عَالِيَ الْمَكَانِ يَا شَدِيْدَ الْاَرْكَانِ
segments.transliteration: yaa a’aleyal makaane yaa shadeedal arkaane

translation.en: O Lofty placed! O Firm in support!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْزِلَ الْقُرْآنِ يَا مُبَدِّلَ الزَّمَانِ
segments.transliteration: yaa munzelal qur-aane yaa mobaddelaz zamaane

translation.en: O Revealer of the Qur'an! O Shifter of time!

segments.arabic: يَا قَابِلَ الْقُرْبَانِ يَا
segments.transliteration: yaa qaabelal qurbaane

translation.en: O Accepter of sacrifices!

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَ الْاِحْسَانِ وَ
segments.transliteration: yaa zal manne wal ehsaane wa

translation.en: O Possessor of might and force! O Merciful!

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْعِزِّ وَ السُّلْطَانِ
segments.transliteration: yaa zal i’zzate was sultaane

translation.en: O Possessor of Omnipotence and Kingdom!

segments.arabic: يَا رَحِيْمُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَبَّ الْاَرْبَابِ
segments.transliteration: yaa raheemo yaa rahmaano yaa rabbal arbaabe

translation.en: O Merciful! O Compassionate! O Lord of lords!

segments.arabic: يَا تَوَّابُ يَا وَهَّابُ يَا مُعْتِقَ الرِّقَابِ
segments.transliteration: yaa tawwaabo yaa wahhaabo yaa mo’teqar reqaabe

translation.en: O Forgiver! O Bestower! O Remover of shackles!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْشِئَالسَّحَابِ يَا مَنْ حَيْثُ
segments.transliteration: yaa munshe-as sahaabe yaa man hayso

translation.en: O Raiser of clouds! O He Who replies

segments.arabic: مَا دُعِيَ اَجَابَ يَا مُرَخِّصَالْاَسْعَارِ
segments.transliteration: maa do-e’ya ajaaba yaa morakhkhesalas-a’are

translation.en: whenever He is called! O Reducer of costs!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنزِّلَ الْاَمْطَارِ
segments.transliteration: yaa monazzelal amtaare

translation.en: O Sender of rain!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْبِتَ الْاَشْجَارِ فِي الْاَرْضِ الْقِفَارِ
segments.transliteration: yaa munbetal ashjaare fil arzil qefaare

translation.en: O Grower of trees in barren land!

segments.arabic: يَا مُخْرِجَ النَّبَاتِ يَا مُحْيِيَ الْاَمْوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa mukhrejan nabaate yaa mohayeyal amwaate

translation.en: O Bringer out of plants (from the ground)! O Giver of life to the dead!

segments.arabic: يَا مُقِيْلَ الْعَثَرَاتِ يَا كَاشِفَ الْكُرُبَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa moqeelal a’saraate yaa kaashefal korobaate

translation.en: O He Who annuls slips! O Remover of troubles!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَضْجُرُهُ الْاَصْوَاتُ
segments.transliteration: yaa man laa tazjorohul aswaato

translation.en: O He Who does not get annoyed by the sounds (of those who call upon Him),

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُشَبِّهُ عَلَيْهِ اللُّغَاتُ وَ لَا تَغْشَاهالظُّلُمَاتُ ُ
segments.transliteration: wa laa toshabbeho a’layhil loghaato wa laa taghshaahuz zolomaato

translation.en: nor are words ever indistinct for Him, nor does darkness cover Him.

segments.arabic: يَا مُعْطِيَ السُؤْلَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa mo’teyas soa-laate

translation.en: O Bestower of requests!

segments.arabic: يَا وَلِيَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يَا دَافِعَ الْبَلِيَّاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa waliyyal hasanaate yaa daa-fe-a’l baliyyaate

translation.en: O Sponsorer of good! O Repeller of adversities!

segments.arabic: يَا قَابِلَ الصَّدَقَاتِ يَا قَابِلَ التَّوْبَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa qaabelas sadaqaate yaa qaabelat tawbaate

translation.en: O Accepter of charity! O Accepter of repentance!

segments.arabic: يَا عَالِمَ الْخَفِيَّاتِ يَا مُجِيْبَ الدَّعْوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa a’alemal khafiyyaate yaa mojeebad da’waate

translation.en: O Knower of the hidden! O Answerer of supplications!

segments.arabic: يَا رَافِعَ الدَّرَجَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa raafe-a’d darajaate

translation.en: O Exalter in rank!

segments.arabic: يَا قَاضِيَ الْحَاجَاتِ يَا رَاحِمَ الْعَبَرَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa qaazeyal haajaate yaa raahemal a’baraate

translation.en: O Provider of all needs! O Merciful on those who shed tears!

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْجِحَ الطَّلِبَاتِ يَا مُنْزِلَ الْبَرَكَاتِ
segments.transliteration: yaa munjehat talebaate yaa munzelal barakaate

translation.en: O Fulfiller of entreaties! O Sender of blessings!

segments.arabic: يَا جَامِعَ الشَّتَاتِ يَا رَادَّ مَا كَانَ فَاتَ
segments.transliteration: yaa jaame-a’sh shataate yaa raadda maa kaana faata

translation.en: O Gatherer of all scattered things! O He Who brings back what has passed away!

segments.arabic: جَمَالَ الْاَرَضِيْنَ وَ السَّمَاوَاتِ يَا
segments.transliteration: yaa jamaalal arazeena was samaawaate

translation.en: O Beautifier of the earth and the heavens!

segments.arabic: يَا سَابِغَ النِّعَمِ يَا كَاشِفَ الْاَلَمِ
segments.transliteration: yaa saabeghan ne-a’me yaa kaashefal alame

translation.en: O Ample in blessings! O Remover of pain!

segments.arabic: يَا شَافِيَ السَّقَمِ يَا مَعْدِنَ الْجُوْدِ
segments.transliteration: yaa shaafeyas saqame yaa ma’denal joode

translation.en: O Healer of sickness! O Source of generosity

segments.arabic: وَ الْكَرَمِ يَا اَجْوَدَ الْاَجْوَدِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wal karame yaa ajwadal ajwadeena

translation.en: and munificence! O Most Munificent of the munificent!

segments.arabic: يَا اَكْرَمَ الْاَكْرَمِيْنَ يَا اَسْمَعَ السَّامِعِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa akramal akrameena yaa asma-a’s saame-e’ena

translation.en: O Most Generous of the generous! O Most Hearing of the hearers!

segments.arabic: يَا اَبْصَرَ النَّاظِرِيْنَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa absaran naazereena yaa arhamar raahemeena

translation.en: O Most Seeing of the seers! O Most Merciful of the merciful!

segments.arabic: يَا اَقْرَبَ الْاَقْرَبِيْنَ يَا اِلٰهَ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa aqrabal aqrabeena yaa elaahal a’alameena

translation.en: O Closest of the close! O Lord of the universe!

segments.arabic: يَا غِيَاثَ الْمُسْتَغِيْثِيْنَ يَا جَارَ الْمُسْتَجِيْرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa gheyaasal mustagheeseena yaa jaaral mustajeereena

translation.en: O Helper of those who seek help! O Protector of those who seek protection!

segments.arabic: يَا مُتَجَاوِزًا عَنِ الْمُسِيْئِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa motajaawezan a’nil mosee-eena

translation.en: O Excuser of those who are at fault!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا يُعَجِّلُ عَلَى الْخَاطِئِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa man laa yo-a’jjelo a’lal khaate-eena

translation.en: O He Who does not hurry in punishing the wrongdoers!

segments.arabic: يَا فَكَّاكَ الْمَأْسُوْرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa fakkaakal maasooreena

translation.en: O Freer of captives!

segments.arabic: يَا مُفَرِّجَ غَمِّ الْمَغْمُوْمِيْنَ يَا جَامِعَ الْمُتَفَرِّقِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa mofarreja ghammil maghmoomeena yaa jaame-a’l motafarreqeena

translation.en: O Reliever of sorrows of the sorrowful! O Gatherer of those who have separated!

segments.arabic: يَا مُدْرِكَ الْهَارِبِيْنَ يَا غَايَةَ الطَّالِبِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: yaa mudrekal haarebeena yaa ghaayatat taalebeena

translation.en: O One Who watches over runaways! O Goal of the seekers!

segments.arabic: يَا صَاحِبَ كُلِّ غَرِيْبٍ يَا مُوْنِسَ كُلوَحِيْدٍ ِّ
segments.transliteration: yaa saaheba kulle ghareebin yaa moonesa kulle waheedin

translation.en: O Companion of every stranger! O Confidant of every lonely person!

segments.arabic: يَا رَاحِمَ الشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: yaa raahemash shaykil kabeere

translation.en: O Merciful to the old man!

segments.arabic: يَا رَازِقَ الطِّفْلِ الصَّغِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: yaa raazeqat tiflish sagheere

translation.en: O Provider for the small child!

segments.arabic: يَا جَابِرَ الْعَظْمِ الْكَسِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: yaa jaaberal a’zmil kaseere

translation.en: O Setter of broken bones!

segments.arabic: يَا عِصْمَةَ الْخَائِفِ الْمُسْتَجِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: yaa i’smatal khaa-efil mustajeere

translation.en: O Safeguard of the fearful seeker of protection!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَهُ التَّدْبِيْرُ وَ اِلَيْهِ التَّقْدِيْرُ
segments.transliteration: yaa man lahut tadbeero wa elayhit taqdeero

translation.en: O He Who governs and determines!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِ الْعَسِيْرُ عَلَيْهِ سَهْلٌ يَسِيْرٌ
segments.transliteration: yaa manil a’seero a’layhe sah-lun yaseerun

translation.en: O He for Whom the difficult is simple and easy!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَبِيْرٌ
segments.transliteration: yaa man howa be-kulle shay-in khabeerun

translation.en: O He Who is aware of all things!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلٰىكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ
segments.transliteration: yaa man howa a’laa kulle shay-in qadeerun

translation.en: O He Who has power over all things!

segments.arabic: يَا خَالِقَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْقَمَرِ الْمُنِيْرِ
segments.transliteration: yaa khaaleqas samaa-e wal qamaril moneere

translation.en: O Creator of the heavens and the shining moon!

segments.arabic: يَا فَالِقَ الْاِصْبَاحِ يَا
segments.transliteration: yaa faaleqal isbaahe yaa

translation.en: O Cleaver of the dawn! O

segments.arabic: مُرْسِلَ الرِّيَاحِ يَا بَاعِثَ الْاَرْوَاحِ
segments.transliteration: murselar reyaahe yaa baa-e’sal arwaahe

translation.en: Sender of winds! O Dispatcher of the spirits!

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْجُوْدِ وَ السَّمَاحِ
segments.transliteration: yaa zal joode was samaa-he

translation.en: O He Who possesses munificence and forbearance!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهٖ كُلُّ مِفْتَاحٍ
segments.transliteration: yaa man be-yadehi kullo miftaahin

translation.en: O He in Whose hands are all the keys!

segments.arabic: يَا عِمَادَ مَنْ لَا عِمَادَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa e’maada man laa e’maada lahu

translation.en: O Support for the one who has no support!

segments.arabic: يَا سَنَدَ مَنْ لَا سَنَدَ لَهٗ يَا ذُخْرَ مَنْ لَا ذُخْرَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa sanada man laa sanada lahu yaa zukhra man laa zukhra lahu

translation.en: O Protector of the one with no protector! O Provider of the one with no provisions!

segments.arabic: يَا عِزَّ مَنْ لَا عِزَّ لَهٗ يَا كَنْزَ مَنْ لَا كَنْزَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa i’zza man laa i’zza lahu yaa kanza man laa kanza lahu

translation.en: O Mighty for the one who has no might! O Treasure for the one who has no treasure!

segments.arabic: يَا حِرْزَ مَنْ لَا حِرْزَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa hirza man laa hirza lahu

translation.en: O Sanctuary for the one who has no sanctuary!

segments.arabic: يَا عَوْنَ مَنْ لَا عَوْنَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa a’wna man laa a’wna lahu

translation.en: O Helper of the one with no helper!

segments.arabic: يَا رُكْنَ مَنْ لَا رُكْنَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: ya rukna man la rukna lahu

translation.en: O Foundation for the one with no foundation!

segments.arabic: يَا غِيَاثَ مَنْ لَا غِيَاثَ لَهٗ
segments.transliteration: yaa gheyaasa man laa gheyaasa lahu

translation.en: O Provider of aid for the one with no aid!

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيْمَ الْمَنِّ يَا كَرِيْمَ الْعَفْوِ يَا حَسَنَ التَّجَاوُزِ
segments.transliteration: yaa a’zeemal manne yaa kareemal a’fwe yaa hasanat tajaawoze

translation.en: O Giver of great hope! O Munificent in forgiving! O Best accepter of excuses!

segments.arabic: يَا وَاسِعَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ يَا بَاسِطَ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالرَّحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: yaa waase-a’l maghferate yaa baasetal yadayne bir-rahmate

translation.en: O Great pardoner! O One Whose hands are open with mercy!

segments.arabic: يَا مُبْتَدِئًا بِالنِّعَمِ قَبْلَ اسْتِحْقَاقِهَا
segments.transliteration: yaa mubtade-an bin-ne-a’me qablas tehqaaqehaa

translation.en: O Giver of blessings before they are deserved!

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْحُجَّةِ الْبَالِغَةِ يَا ذَا الْمُلْكِ
segments.transliteration: yaa zallhujajate-lbaleote yaa zal-lamollake

translation.en: O Possessor of the indisputable proof! O Owner of the kingdom

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَ الْمَلَكُوْتِ يَا ذَا الْعِزِّ
segments.transliteration: wal malakoote yaa zal i’zze

translation.en: and sovereignty! O Possessor of might

segments.arabic: الْغُيُوْبِوَ الْجَبَرُوْتِ يَا مَنْ هُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوْتُ
segments.transliteration: wal jabaroote yaa man howa hayyun laa yamoot.

translation.en: and power! O He Who is living and will never die!

segments.arabic: وَ بِمَعْرِفَتِكَ مَا فِيْ ضَمَائِرِ الْقُلُوْبِ
segments.transliteration: wa be-ma’refateka maa fee zamaa-eril qoloobe

translation.en: I beseech You by Your knowledge of the unseen, and by Your understanding of what is in the depths of the hearts,

segments.arabic: وَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ اصْطَفَيْتَهٗ لِنَفْسِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa bekulle ismin howa lakas tafaytahu le-nafseka

translation.en: and by every name that You have chosen for Yourself

segments.arabic: اَوْ اَنْزَلْتَهٗ فِيْ كِتَابٍ مِنْ كُتُبِكَ
segments.transliteration: aw anzaltahu fee ketaabin min kotobeka

translation.en: or have sent down in a book from among Your books

segments.arabic: اَوِ اسْتَاْثَرْتَ بِهٖ فِيْ عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: awis taa-sarta behi fee i’lmil ghaybe i’ndaka

translation.en: or have hidden in Your unseen knowledge;

segments.arabic: وَ بِاَسْمَائِكَ الْحُسْنٰى كُلِّهَا حَتّٰى انْتَهٰى
segments.transliteration: wa be-asmaa-ekal husnaa kullehaa hattan tahaa

translation.en: and by all Your beautiful names until arriving

segments.arabic: اِسْمِكَ الْعَظِيْمِ الْاَعْظَمِ الَّذِيْ اِلٰى
segments.transliteration: elaa ismekal a’zeemil a-a’zamil lazee

translation.en: at Your Most High and Lofty Name which You

segments.arabic: فَضَّلْتَهٗ عَلٰى جَمِيْعِ اَسْمَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: fazzaltahu a’laa jamee-e’ asmaa-eka.

translation.en: have exalted over all Your other names.

segments.arabic: اَسْاَلُكَ بِهٖ اَسْاَلُكَ بِهٖ اَسْاَلُكَ بِهٖ
segments.transliteration: as-aloka behi as-aloka behi as-aloka behi

translation.en: I beseech You by it! I beseech You by it! I beseech You by it!

segments.arabic: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهٖ
segments.transliteration: an tosalleya a’laa mohammadin wa aalehi

translation.en: That You send blessings on Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْ تُيَسِّرَ لِيْ مِنْ اَمْرِيْ مَا اَخَافُ عُسْرَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa an toyassera lee min amree maa akhaafo u’srahu

translation.en: and that You make easy for me that which I fear to be difficult,

segments.arabic: وَ تُفَرِّجَ عَنِّي الْهَمَّ وَ الْغَمَّ وَ الْكَرْبَ
segments.transliteration: wa tofarreja a’nnil hamma wal ghamma wal karba

translation.en: and that You relieve me of grief, sorrow and troubles,

segments.arabic: وَ مَا ضَاقَ بِهٖ صَدْرِيْ وَ
segments.transliteration: wa maa zaaqa behi sadree wa

translation.en: and whatever makes me distressed or

segments.arabic: عِيْلَ بِهٖ صَبْرِيْ فَاِنَّهٗ لَا يَقْدِرُ
segments.transliteration: e’ela behi sabree fa-innahu laa yaqdero

translation.en: weakens my patience, for surely there is none who has the power

segments.arabic: عَلٰى فَرَجِيْ سِوَاكَ وَ افْعَلْ بِيْ
segments.transliteration: a’laa farajee sewaaka waf a’l bee

translation.en: to relieve me other than You; and deal with me

segments.arabic: مَا اَنْتَ اَهْلُهٗ يَا اَهْلَ التَّقْوٰى
segments.transliteration: ma anta ahlahu yaa ahla-latqwa

translation.en: in a manner that befits You, O worthy of Fear

segments.arabic: وَ اَهْلَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ يَا مَنْ لَا يَكْشِفُ الْكَرْبَ غَيْرُهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa ahlal maghferate yaa man laa yaksheful karba ghayrohu

translation.en: and worthy of (granting) Pardon! O One other than Whom none can resolve difficulties

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يُجَلِّي الْحُزْنَ سِوَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa laa yojallil huzna sewaaho

translation.en: and none can remove sorrow,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا يُفَرِّجْ عَنِّيْ اِلَّا هُوَ اِكْفِنِيْ شَرَّ نَفْسِيْ خَاصَّةً
segments.transliteration: wa laa yofarrij a’nnee illaa howa ikfenee sharra nafsee khaassatan

translation.en: and none can deliver me but He! Save me from the evil of my self in particular

segments.arabic: وَ شَرَّ النَّاسِ عَامَّةً وَ اَصْلِحْ لِيْ شَاْنِيْ كُلَّهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa sharran naase a’ammatan wa asleh lee shaanee kullahu

translation.en: and from the evil of people in general; and set right all my issues

segments.arabic: وَ اَصْلِحْ اُمُوْرِيْ وَ اقْضِ لِيْ حَوَائِجِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa asleh omooree waq ze lee hawaa-ejee

translation.en: and set right all my matters, and fulfill my desires,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ لِيْ مِنْ اَمْرِيْ فَرَجًا
segments.transliteration: waj a’l lee min amree farajan

translation.en: and grant me an escape

segments.arabic: وَ مَخْرَجًا فَاِنَّكَ تَعْلَمُ وَ لَا اَعْلَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa makhrajan fa-innaka ta’lamo wa laa a-a’lamo

translation.en: for surely You know and I do not know,

segments.arabic: وَ تُقَدِّرُ وَ لَا اُقَدِّرُ وَ اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa toqaddero wa laa oqaddero wa anta

translation.en: and You have power and I have no power, and You

segments.arabic: عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ
segments.transliteration: a’laa kulle shay-in qadeerun

translation.en: have power over all things –

segments.arabic: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا اَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِين
segments.transliteration: be-rahmateka yaa arhamar raahemeen.

translation.en: by Your Mercy O Most Merciful of mercifuls.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِيْ صَبُوْرًا وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ شَكُوْرًا
segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’lnee sabooran waj a’lnee shakooran

translation.en: O Allah! Make me patient, and make me thankful,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِيْ فِيْ اَمَانِكَ
segments.transliteration: waj a’lnee fee amaaneka.

translation.en: and keep me in Your protection.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اقْسِمْ لَنَا مِنْ خَشْيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaq sim lanaa min khashyateka

translation.en: O Allah apportion for us from Your fear

segments.arabic: مَا يَحُوْلُ بَيْنَنَا وَ بَيْنَ مَعْصِيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: maa yahoolo baynanaa wa bayna ma’seyateka
