translation.en: that which would remove us from Your disobedience,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ مَا تُبَلِّغْنَا بِهٖ جَنَّتَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa min taa-a’teka maa toballeghonaa behi jannataka

translation.en: and (apportion for us) from Your obedience that which would get us to paradise,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنَ الْيَقِيْنِ مَا يُهَوِّنُ عَلَيْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa menal yaqeene maa yohawweno a’laynaa

translation.en: and from certitude that which would ease

segments.arabic: مِنْ مَصَائِبِ الدُّنْيَا وَ مَتِّعْنَا بِاَسْمَاعِنَا
segments.transliteration: min masaa-ebid dunyaa wa matte’naa be-asmaa-e’naa

translation.en: the troubles of this world; and grant us the continued use of our hearing

segments.arabic: وَ اَبْصَارِنَا عَلٰى مَنْ عَادَانَا
segments.transliteration: wa absaarenaa a’laa man a’adaanaa

translation.en: and sight, and help us against our enemies,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلِ الدُّنْيَا اَكْبَرَ هَمِّنَا
segments.transliteration: wa laa taj-a’lid dunyaa akbara hammenaa

translation.en: and do not make this world our greatest concern,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنمَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُنَا.َا
segments.transliteration: wa laa tosallit a’laynaaman laa yarhamonaa.

translation.en: and do not give mastery over us to those who have no mercy on us.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ واِلَيْكَ الْمُشْتَكٰى وَ اَنْتَ الْمُسْتَعَانَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo waelaykal mushtakaa wa antal musta-a’ano

translation.en: O Allah! All praise be to You. To You does the complainer refer and You are the Helper;

segments.arabic: وَ فِيْمَا عِنْدَكَ مِنَ الرَّغْبَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa feemaa i’ndaka menar raghbate

translation.en: You have what is desired

segments.arabic: عَوْرَتِيْ.وَ لَدَيْكَ غَايَةُ الطَّلِبَةِ. اَللّٰهُمَّ آمِنْ رَوْعَتِيْ وَ اسْتُرْ
segments.transliteration: wa ladayka ghaayatut talebate. allaahumma aamin raw-a’tee was tur a’wratee.

translation.en: and with You lies the end of all wishes. O Allah! Calm my fear and hide my faults.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اَصْلِحْ دِيْنَنَا الَّذِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma asleh deenanal lazee

translation.en: O Allah! Make right our religion which is

segments.arabic: هُوَ عِصْمَةُ اَمْرِنَا
segments.transliteration: howa i’smato amrenaa

translation.en: the protection for our affairs,

segments.arabic: وَ اَصْلِحْ لَنَا دُنْيَانَا الَّتِيْ فِيْهَا مَعَاشُنَا
segments.transliteration: wa asleh lanaa dunyaanal latee feehaa ma-a’ashonaa

translation.en: and make right our world for it is the place wherein we live,

segments.arabic: وَ اَصْلِحْ آخِرَتَنَا الَّتِيْ اِلَيْهَا مُنْقَلَبُنَا
segments.transliteration: wa asleh aakheratanal latee elayhaa munqalabonaa

translation.en: and make right our hereafter for it is our eventual destination;

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلِ الْحَيَاةَ زِيَادَةً لَنَا فِيْ كُلِّ خَيْر
segments.transliteration: waj a’lil hayaata zeyaadatan lanaa fee kulle khayrin

translation.en: and make the life (in this world) more for us in every good,

segments.arabic: وَ الْوَفَاةَ رَاحَةً لَنَا مِنْ كُلِّ سُوْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wal wafaata raahatan lanaa min kulle soo-in.

translation.en: and make death a relief for us from every evil.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّا نَسْاَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innaa nas-aloka

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You

segments.arabic: مُوْجِبَاتِ رَحْمَتِكَ وَ عَزَائِمَ مَغْفِرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: moojebaate rahmateka wa a’azaaema maghferateka

translation.en: for all that which is the cause of Your Mercy, and that which ascertains Your Forgiveness;

segments.arabic: وَ الْغَنِيْمَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ بِرٍّ
segments.transliteration: wal ghaneemata min kulle birrin

translation.en: and benefit from every virtue,

segments.arabic: وَ السَّلَامَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ اِثْمٍ
segments.transliteration: was salaamata min kulle ismin

translation.en: and safety from every sin.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْضِعَ كُلِّ شَكْوٰى
segments.transliteration: yaa maw-ze-a’ kulle shakwaa

translation.en: O One to Whom all complain!

segments.arabic: وَ شَاهِدَ كُلِّ نَجْوٰى
segments.transliteration: wa shaaheda kulle najwaa

translation.en: O Witness of all secret communications!

segments.arabic: وَ كَاشِفَ كُلِّ بَلْوٰى فَاِنَّكَ تَرٰى
segments.transliteration: wa kaashefa kulle balwaa fa-innaka taraa wa laa toraa

translation.en: O Reliever of all troubles! Verily You see but cannot be seen,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُرٰى وَ اَنْتَ بِالْمَنْظَرِ الْاَعْلٰى اَسْاَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ
segments.transliteration: wa anta bil-manzaril a-a’laa as-alokal jannata

translation.en: and You are in the highest viewpoint; I beg You for paradise

segments.arabic: وَ مَا يُقَرِّبُ اِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ اَوْ فِعْل
segments.transliteration: wa maa yoqarrebo elayhaa min qawlin aw fe’lin

translation.en: and whatever brings me closer to it from words and actions,

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka menan naare

translation.en: and I seek Your protection from the hellfire

segments.arabic: وَ مَا يُقَرِّبُ اِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ اَوْ فِعْلٍ.
segments.transliteration: wa maa yoqarrebo elayhaa min qawlin wa fe’lin.

translation.en: and whatever brings me closer to it from words and actions.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ خَيْرَ الْخَيْرِ رِضْوَانَكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee as-aloka khayral khayre rizwaanaka

translation.en: O Allah! I beseech You for the best of Your good pleasure

segments.arabic: وَ الْجَنَّةَ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wal jannata wa a-o’ozo beka

translation.en: and paradise, and I seek Your

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ الشَّرِّ سَخَطُكَ وَ النَّارُ اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَسْاَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: min sharrish sharre sakhatoka wan naaro. allaahumma innee as-aloka

translation.en: protection from the worst of Your wrath and the hellfire. O Allah! I ask for

segments.arabic: خَيْرَ مَا تَعْلَمُ وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ
segments.transliteration: khara maa ta’lamo wa a-o’ozo beka min sharre

translation.en: the good that You know and seek protection from the evil that

segments.arabic: مَا تَعْلَمُ فَاِنَّكَ اَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوْبِ.
segments.transliteration: maa ta’lamo fa-innaka anta a’llaamul ghoyoobe.

translation.en: You know, for verily You are the knower of the unseen.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka

translation.en: O Allah! I seek Your

segments.arabic: مِنْ سُوْءِ الْقَضَاءِ وَ سُوْءِ الْقَدَرِ
segments.transliteration: min soo-il qazaa-e wa soo-il qadare

translation.en: protection from a bad fate and a bad destiny

segments.arabic: وَ سُوْءِ الْمَنْظَرِ
segments.transliteration: wa soo-il manzare

translation.en: and a look that is harmful

segments.arabic: فِيْ الْاَهْلِ وَ الْمَالِ وَ الْوَلَدِ.
segments.transliteration: fil ahle wal maale wal walade.

translation.en: to my family, property and children.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ غِنًي يُطْغِيْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka min ghenan yut-gheenee

translation.en: O Allah! I seek Your protection from wealth that causes me to transgress,

segments.arabic: وَ فَقْرٍ يُنْسِيْنِيْ وَ هَوًي يُرْدِيْنِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa faqrin yunseenee wa hawan yurdeenee

translation.en: and from poverty that makes me forget (Your bounties), and from the desire that ruins me,

segments.arabic: وَ عَمَلٍ يُخْزِيْنِيْ وَ جَارٍ يُؤْذِيْنِي
segments.transliteration: wa a’malin yukhzeenee wa jaarin yoazeenee..

translation.en: and from the action that disgraces me and from the neighbor who disturbs me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْنَا مَشْغُوْلِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’lnaa mashghooleena

translation.en: O Allah! Make us occupied

segments.arabic: بِاَمْرِكَ آمِنِيْنَ بِوَعْدِكَ آيِسِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: be-amreka aameneena be-wa’deka aayeseena

translation.en: in following Your commandments, trust in Your promise, lose hope

segments.arabic: مِنْ خَلْقِكَ آنِسِيْنَ بِكَ مُسْتَوْحِشِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: min khalqeka aaneseena beka mustawhesheena

translation.en: in Your creation, become close with You, feel repelled

segments.arabic: مِنْ غَيْرِكَ رَاضِيْنَ بِقَضَائِكَ صَابِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: min ghayreka raazeena beqazaa-eka saabereena

translation.en: by other than You, are pleased with Your decree, patient

segments.arabic: عَلٰى بَلَائِكَ شَاكِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: a’laa balaa-eka shaakereena

translation.en: with Your trials, thankful

segments.arabic: عَلٰى نَعْمَائِكَ مُتَلَذِّذِيْنَ بِذِكْرِكَ فَرِحِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: a’laa na’maaeka motalazze-zeena be-zikreka fareheena

translation.en: for Your blessings, enjoy Your remembrance, are happy

segments.arabic: بِكِتَابِكَ مُنَاجِيْنَ اِيَّاكَ آنَاءَ اللَّيْلِ
segments.transliteration: be-ketaabeka monaajeena iyyaaka aanaa-al layle

translation.en: with Your book, whisper to You in the darkness of the night

segments.arabic: وَ اَطْرَافَ النَّهَارِ مُسْتَعِدِّيْنَ لِلْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: wa atraafan nahaare musta-i’ddeena lil-mawte

translation.en: and the light of day, are ready for death,

segments.arabic: مُشْتَاقِيْنَ اِلٰى لِقَائِكَ مُتَبَغِّضِيْنَ لِلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: mushtaaqeena elaa leqaa-eka motabaghghezeena lid-dunyaa

translation.en: crave for meeting with You, hate this world

segments.arabic: لِلْآخِرَةِمُحِبِّيْنَ
segments.transliteration: lil-aakherate mohibbeena

translation.en: and love the hereafter;

segments.arabic: آتِنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا عَلٰى وَ
segments.transliteration: wa aatenaa maa wa-a’dtanaa a’laa

translation.en: and grant us what You have promised us

segments.arabic: رُسُلِكَ وَ لَا تُخْزِنَا يَوْمالْقِيَامَةِ اِنَّكَ لَا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيْعَاد َ
segments.transliteration: rosoleka wa laa tukhzenaa yawmal qeyaamate innaka laa tukhleful mee-a’ade.

translation.en: by Your prophets and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection, surely You do not break Your promises.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَکَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا خَالِدًا مَعَ خُلُوْدِکَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo hamdan khaaledan ma-a’ kholoodeka

translation.en: O Allah! All praise be to You - praise which is eternal with Your Everlastingness.

segments.arabic: وَ لَکَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا لَا مُنْتَهٰي لَهٗ دُوْنَ عِلْمِکَ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo hamdan laa muntahaa lahu doona i’lmeka

translation.en: All praise be to You - praise that is unending but by Your knowledge.

segments.arabic: وَ لَکالْحَمْدُ حَمْدًاَ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo hamdan

translation.en: All praise be to You - praise that

segments.arabic: اَمَدَ لَهٗ دُوْنَ مَشِيَّتِکَ
segments.transliteration: amada lahu doona mashiyyateka

translation.en: has no limit in duration but by Your will.

segments.arabic: وَ لَکالْحَمْدُ حَمْدًاَ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo hamdan

translation.en: All praise be to - You praise that

segments.arabic: لَا اَجْرَ لِقَآئِلِهٖ اِلَّا رِضَاکَ.
segments.transliteration: laa ajra leqaaa-elehi illaa rezaaka.

translation.en: gives no reward to its utterer apart from Your pleasure.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ كُلُّهٗ ولَكَ الْمَنُّ كُلُّهٗ وَ لَكَ الْفَخْرُ كُلُّهَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo kullohu wa lakal manno kullohu wa lakal fakhro kullohu

translation.en: O Allah! All praise is for You, and all graciousness is from You, and all pride is Yours,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْبَهَاءُ كُلُّهٗ وَ لَكَ النُّوكُلُّ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal bahaa-o kullohu wa lakan nooro kullohu

translation.en: and all magnificence is Yours, and all light is Yours,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْعِزَّةُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ الْجَبَرُوْتُ كُلُّهَا
segments.transliteration: wa lakal i’zzato kullohaa wa lakal jabarooto kullohaa

translation.en: and all respect is Yours, and all power is Yours,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْعَظَمَةُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ الدُّنْيَا كُلُّهَا
segments.transliteration: wa lakal a’zamato kullohaa wa lakad dunyaa kullohaa

translation.en: and all might is Yours, and the whole world is Yours,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْآخِرَةُ كُلُّهَا وَ لَكَ اللَّيْلُ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal aakherato kulloha wa lakal laylo

translation.en: and the whole hereafter is Yours, and all the nights

segments.arabic: وَ النَّهَارُ كُلُّهٗ وَ لَكَ الْخَلْقُ كُلُّهٗ
segments.transliteration: wan nahaaro kullohu wa lakal khalqo kullohu

translation.en: and days are Yours, and all creation is Yours,

segments.arabic: وَ بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ كُلُّهٗ وَ اِلَيْكَ يَرْجِعُ الْاَمْرُ كُلُّهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa beyadekal khayro kullohu wa elayka yarje-u’l amro kullohu

translation.en: and in Your hand is all good, and to You return all affairs,

segments.arabic: عَلَانِيَتُهٗ وَ سِرُّهُ
segments.transliteration: a’laaneyatohu wa sirrohu.

translation.en: open or secret.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ حَمْدًا اَبَدًا اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo hamdan abadan anta

translation.en: O Allah! All praise is for You – an everlasting praise.

segments.arabic: حَسَنُ الْبَلَاءِ جَلِيْلُ الثَّنَاءِ سَابِغُ النَّعْمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: hasanul balaa-e jaleelus sanaa-e saabeghun na’maae

translation.en: You are the Best Tester, the Most Praiseworthy, Ample in blessings,

segments.arabic: عَدْلُ الْقَضَاءِ جَزِيْلُ الْعَطَاءِ حَسَنُ الْآلَاءِ اِلٰهُ
segments.transliteration: a’dlul qazaa-e jazeelul a’taa-e hasanul aalaa-e elaaho

translation.en: Just in passing decrees, Most Generous in giving, the Best Bestower of bounties,

segments.arabic: مَنْ فِي الْاَرْضِوَ اِلٰهُ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاء
segments.transliteration: man fil arze wa elaaho man fis samaa-e

translation.en: Lord of all who are in the earth, and Lord of all in the heavens.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي السَّبْعِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma lakal hamdo fis sab-i’s

translation.en: O Allah! All praise is for You in the seven years

segments.arabic: الشِّدَادِ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْاَرْضِ الْمِهَادِ
segments.transliteration: shedaade wa lakal hamdo fil arzil mehaade

translation.en: of hardship, and for You is all praise in the wide expanse of the earth,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ طَاقَةَ الْعِبَادِ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo taaqatal e’baade

translation.en: and all praise is for You as much as the ability of the servants,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ سَعَةَ الْبِلَادِ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo sa-a’tal belaade

translation.en: and all praise is for You up to the limits of the land,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْجِبَالِ الْاَوْتَادِ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo fil jebaalil awtaade

translation.en: and all praise is for You in the mountains that act as pegs,

segments.arabic: لَوكَ الْحَمْدُفِي اللَّيْلِ اِذَا يَغْشٰى
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo fil layle ezaa yaghshaa

translation.en: and all praise is for You in the night when it draws a veil,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي النَّهَارِ اِذَا تَجَلّٰى
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo fin nahaare ezaa tajallaa

translation.en: and all praise is for You in the day when it shines in brightness,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَ الْاُوْلٰى
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo fil aakherate wal oolaaa’

translation.en: and all praise is for You in the hereafter and the former,

segments.arabic: وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ فِي الْمَثَانِيْ وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: wa lakal hamdo fil masaanee wal qur-aanil a’zeem.

translation.en: and all praise is for You in the Seven Oft-repeated Verses and the Glorious Qur'an.

segments.arabic: وَ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَ بِحَمْدِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa subhaanal laahe wa be-hamdehi

translation.en: Glory and praise be to Allah;

segments.arabic: وَ الْاَرْضُ جَمِيْعًا قَبْضَتُهٗ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wal arzo jamee-a’n qabzatohu yawmal qeyaamate

translation.en: and the whole earth will be in His grip on the Day of Resurrection

segments.arabic: وَ السَّمٰوَاتُ مَطْوِيَّاتٌ بِيَمِيْنِهٖ سُبْحانَهٗ
segments.transliteration: was samaawaato matwiyyaatun be-yameenehi subhaanahu

translation.en: and the heavens will be rolled up in His right hand. Glory

segments.arabic: وَ تَعَالٰىعَمَّا يُشْرِكُوْنَ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ta-a’alaa a’mmaa yushrekoona subhaanal laahe

translation.en: be to Him, and far is He above the partners they ascribe to Him; Glory

segments.arabic: وَ بِحَمْدِهٖ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ هَالِكٌ اِلَّا وَجْهَه
segments.transliteration: wa be-hamdehi kullo shay-in haalekun illaa wajhahu.

translation.en: and praise be to Allah, all things will perish except He.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ رَبَّنَا وَ تَعَالَيْتَ وَ تَبَارَكْتَ
segments.transliteration: subhaanaka rabbanaa wa ta-a’alayta wa tabaarakta

translation.en: Glory be to You our Lord, the Sublime, the Divine,

segments.arabic: وَ تَقَدَّسْتَ خَلَقْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِقُدْرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa taqaddasta khalaqta kulla shay in be-qadrateka

translation.en: the Noble; You created everything with Your power,

segments.arabic: وَ قَهَرْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِعِزَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qaharta kulla shay-in be-i’zzateka

translation.en: and You overpower everything by Your might,

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَوْتَ فَوْقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ بِارْتِفَاعِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a’lawta fawqa kulle shay-in bir-tefaa-e’ka

translation.en: and You have risen above everything with Your exaltedness,

segments.arabic: وَ غَلَبْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِقُوَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ghalabta kulla shay-in be-quwwateka

translation.en: and You have conquered everything with Your strength,

segments.arabic: وَ ابْتَدَعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ بِحِكْمَتِكَ وَ عِلْمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wab tadayta kulla shay-in be-hikmateka wa i’lmeka

translation.en: and You originated everything with Your wisdom and knowledge,

segments.arabic: وَ بَعَثْتَ الرُّسُلَ بِكُتُبِكَ وَ هَدَيْتَ الصَّالِحِيْنَ بِاِذْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ba-a’star rosola be-kotobeka wa hadaytas saaleheena be-izneka

translation.en: and You sent the prophets with Your books, and You guided the righteous with Your permission,

segments.arabic: وَ اَيَّدْتَ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ بِنَصْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ayyadtal moameneena be-nasreka

translation.en: and You helped the believers with Your divine succor,

segments.arabic: وَ قَهَرْتَ الْخَلْقَ بِسُلْطَانِكَ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa qahartal khalqa be-sultaaneka laa elaaha illaa anta

translation.en: and You ruled over the creation with Your sovereignty. There is no god but You -

segments.arabic: وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَكَ لَا نَعْبُدُ غَيْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wahdaka laa shareeka laka laa na’bodo ghayraka

translation.en: alone without any partner; we do not worship anyone other than You,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا نَسْاَلُ اِلَّا اِيَّاكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa nas-alo illaa iyyaaka

translation.en: and we do not ask anyone but You,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا نَرْغَبُ اِلَّا اِلَيْكَ اَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ شَكْوَانَا
segments.transliteration: wa laa narghabo illaa elayka anta maw-ze-o’ shakwaanaa

translation.en: and we do not desire anything but closeness to You. You are the One to whom we complain,

segments.arabic: وَ مُنْتَهٰى رَغْبَتِنَا وَ اِلٰهُنَا وَ مَلِيْكُنَا.
segments.transliteration: wa muntahaa raghbatenaa wa elaahonaa wa maleekonaa.

translation.en: and You are the goal of our desires, and our Lord and our Master."

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْهَا نِعْمَۃ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’lhaa ne’matan

translation.en: O Allah! Make it a blessing

segments.arabic: مَحْصُوْرَۃً مَشْكُوْرَۃً مَوْصُوْلَۃً بِالْجَنَّۃِ.
segments.transliteration: mahsooratan mashkooratan mawsoolatan bil-jannate.

translation.en: that is limited, appreciated and linked to paradise.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْ حُبَّكَ اَحَبُّ اِلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’l hubbaka ahabbo elayya

translation.en: O Allah! Make Your love more beloved to me

segments.arabic: مِنْ نَفْسِيْ وَ سَمْعِيْ وَ بَصَرِيْ وَ اَهْلِيْ
segments.transliteration: min nafsee wa sam-e’e wa basaree wa ahlee

translation.en: than my self, my hearing, my sight, my family

segments.arabic: وَ مَالِيْ وَ مِنَ الْمَاءِ الْبَارِدِ
segments.transliteration: wa maalee wa menal maa-il baared

translation.en: my wealth and cool water

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَلَدٍ يَكُوْنُ عَلَيَّ رَبًّا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka min waladin yakoono a’layya rabban

translation.en: O Allah! I seek Your protection from a son who subjugates me,,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ مَالٍ يَكُوْنُ عَلَيَّ ضِيَاعًا
segments.transliteration: wa min maalin yakoono a’layya zeyaa-a’n

translation.en: and from wealth that is the cause of my ruin

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ زَوْجَةٍ تُشَيِّبُنِيْ قَبْلَ اَوَانِ مَشِيْبَتِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa min zawjatin toshayyebonee qabla awaanE masheebatee

translation.en: and from the wife who makes me old before my time,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ خَلِيْلٍ مَاكِرٍ عَيْنَاهُ تَرَانِيْ
segments.transliteration: wa min khaleelin maakerin a’ynaaho taraanee

translation.en: and from the conspiring friend whose eyes see me

segments.arabic: وَ قَلْبُهٗ يَرْعَانِيْ اِنْ رَاٰى خَيْرًا دَفَنَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa qalbohu yar-a’anee in ra-aa khayran dafanahu

translation.en: but his heart envies me if he sees any good (action from me) he conceals it

segments.arabic: وَ اِنْ رَاٰى شَرًّا اَذَاعَهٗ
segments.transliteration: wa in ra-aa sharran a-zaa-a’hu

translation.en: and if he sees any bad he spreads it;

segments.arabic: وَ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَجْعِ الْبَطْنِ
segments.transliteration: wa a-o’ozo beka min waj-i’l batne.

translation.en: and I seek Your protection from the pain of the stomach.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ اَنْ اَفْتَقِر
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka an aftaqera

translation.en: O Allah! I seek Your protection from becoming poor

segments.arabic: فِيْ غِنَاكَ اَوْ اَضِلَّ فِيْ هُدَاكَ اَوْ اَذِلَّ
segments.transliteration: fee ghenaaka aw azilla fee hodaaka aw azilla

translation.en: in Your Wealth, or going astray in Your Guidance, or becoming abased

segments.arabic: فِي عِزِّكَ اَوْ اُضَامَ فِيْ سُلْطَانِكَ اَوْ اُضْطَهَدَ
segments.transliteration: fee i’zzeka aw ozaama fee sultaaneka aw uztahada

translation.en: in Your Exaltedness, or getting treated unjustly in Your Dominion, or being persecuted

segments.arabic: اولْاَمْرُ اِلَيْكاَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ
segments.transliteration: wal amro elayka. allaahumma innee

translation.en: while all affairs return to You. O Allah! I

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِكَاَنْ اَقُوْلَ زُوْرًا اَوْ اَغْشٰىفُجُوْرًا
segments.transliteration: a-o’ozo beka an aqoola zooran aw agh-shaa fojooran

translation.en: seek Your protection from speaking lies, or being immoral,

segments.arabic: اَوْ اَكُوْنَ بِكَ مَغْرُوْ
segments.transliteration: aw akoona beka maghrooran.

translation.en: or being arrogant in front of You.

text.en: Fifty 58. His Veil

segments.arabic: وَاِذَا قَرَاْتَ الْقُرْاٰنَ جَعَلْنَا بَيْنَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ezaa qaraatal qur-aana ja-a’lnaa baynaka

translation.en: And when you recite the Qur'an we place between you

segments.arabic: وَبَيْنَ الَّذِيْنَ لَا يُؤْمِنُوْنَ بِالْاٰخِرَۃِ حِجَابًا مَّسْتُوْرًاۙ
segments.transliteration: wa baynal lazeena laa yoamenoona bil-aakherate hejaabam mastooraa.

translation.en: and those who do not believe a hidden barrier

segments.arabic: اُولٰۗىِٕكَ الَّذِيْنَ طَبَعَ اللهُ عَلٰي قُلُوْبِهِم
segments.transliteration: oolaa-ekal lazeena ta-ba-a’l laaho a’laa qoloobehim.

translation.en: These are they on whose hearts Allah has set a seal

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا عَلٰي قُلُوْبِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ja-a’lnaa a’laa qoloobehim

translation.en: And We have put coverings on their hearts

segments.arabic: اَكِنَّۃً اَنْ يَّفْقَهُوْهُ وَفِيْٓ اٰذَانِهِمْ وَقْرًا
segments.transliteration: akinnatan any yafqahooho wa fee aazaanehim waqraa.

translation.en: and deafness in their ears lest they understand

segments.arabic: اَفَرَءَيْتَ مَنِ اتَّخَذَ اِلٰــهَهٗ هَوٰىهُ وَاَضَلَّهُ اللهُ
segments.transliteration: afara-a’yta manit takhaza elaahahu hawaaho wa azallahul laaho

translation.en: Have you then considered him who takes his lowly desire for his god

segments.arabic: عَلٰي عِلْمٍ وَّخَتَمَ عَلٰي سَمْعِهٖ وَقَلْبِهٖ
segments.transliteration: a’laa i’lminw wa khatama a’laa sam-e’hi wa qalbehi

translation.en: Allah has left him astray having knowledge and has set a seal on his hearing and his heart

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَ عَلٰي بَصَرِهٖ غِشٰوَۃًۭ
segments.transliteration: wa ja-a’la a’laa basarehi gheshaawah,

translation.en: and has put a cover on his sight

segments.arabic: فَمَنْ يَّهْدِيْهِ مِنْۢ بَعْدِ اللهِۭ اَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: famany yahdeehe mim ba’dil laah, afalaa tazakkaroon.

translation.en: So who will guide you besides Allah? Will you not remember?

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلي مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma salle a’laa mohammadin

translation.en: O Allah! Bless Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ شَجَرَةِ النُّبُوَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa aale mohammadin shajaratin nobuwwate

translation.en: and the progeny of Muhammad, the evergreen tree of prophethood,

segments.arabic: وَمَوضِعِ الرِّسالَةِ وَ هٰذَا شَهْرُ نَبِيِّکَ سَيِّدِ
segments.transliteration: wa maw-ze-i’r resaalate wa haazaa shahro nabiyyeka sayyede

translation.en: the destination of the Divine Message... and this is the month of Your prophet, master of

segments.arabic: رُسُلِکَ شَعْبَانُ الَّذِيْ حَفَفْتَهٗ مِنْکَ بِالرَّحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: rosoleka sha’baanul lazee hafaftahu minka bir-rahmate

translation.en: Your messengers– Sha'ban, (the month) that You have surrounded with mercy

segments.arabic: وَ الرِّضْوَانِ الَّذِيْ کَانَ رَسُوْلُ اللهِ صَلَّي اللهُ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: war-rizwaanil lazee kaana rasoolul laahe sallal laaho a’layhe

translation.en: and pleasure; in which your messenger salutations be upon him

segments.arabic: وَ آلِهٖ وَ سَلَّمَ يَدْاَبُ فِيْ صِيَامِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa aalehi wa sallama yad-abo fee seyaamehi

translation.en: and his progeny would be untiring in his fasting

segments.arabic: وَ قِيَامِهٖ فِيْ لَيَالِيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa qeyaamehi fee layaaleehe

translation.en: and prayers, in its nights

segments.arabic: وَ اَيَّامِهٖ بُـخُوْعًا لَکَ فِيْ اِکْرَامِهٖ
segments.transliteration: wa ayyaamehi bokhoo-a’n laka fee ikraamehi

translation.en: and days, subjugating himself in front of You in his glorification

segments.arabic: وَ اِعْظَامِهٖ اِلٰي مَحَلِّ حِمَامِهٖ اَللّٰهُمَّ فَاَعِنَّا
segments.transliteration: wa e-a’zaamehi elaa mahalle hemaamehi allaahumma fa-a-i’nna

translation.en: and extolment until he passed away. O Allah! Help us to

segments.arabic: عَلَيالْاِسْتِنَانِ بِسُنَّتِهٖ فِيْهِ
segments.transliteration: a’lal istenaane besunnatehi feehe

translation.en: act upon his sunnah in

segments.arabic: وَ نَيْلِ الشَّفَاعَةِ لَدَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: wa naylish shafaa-a’te ladayhe

translation.en: and to receive his intercession.

segments.arabic: لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهٗ وَ حْدَهٗ وَحْدَه
segments.transliteration: laa elaaha illal laaho wahdahu wahdahu wahdahu

translation.en: There is no god but Allah, alone, alone, alone,

segments.arabic: لَا شَرِيْكَ لَهٗ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ
segments.transliteration: laa shareeka lahu lahul mulko

translation.en: having no partners, His is the kingdom

segments.arabic: وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِيْ وَ يُمِيْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa lahul hamdo yohyee wa yomeeto

translation.en: and for Him is all praise, He gives life and death;

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوْتُ بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْر
segments.transliteration: wa howa hayyun laa yamooto be-yadehil khayro

translation.en: He is living and will not die, by His hand is all good

segments.arabic: وَ هُوَعَلٰي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ.
segments.transliteration: wa howa a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer.

translation.en: and He has power over all things.

text.en: Fifty 59. His Dua When Burning Incense

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلهِ الَّذِيْ بِنِعْمَتِهٖتَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ.
segments.transliteration: al-hamdo lillaahil lazee be-ne’matehitatimmus saalehaat.

translation.en: All praise is due to Allah, the One by Whose blessing all virtues are complete.

segments.arabic: طَيِّبْ عُرْفَنَا وَ ذَكِّ رَوَائِـحَنَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma tayyib u’rfanaa wa zakke rawaa-ehanaa

translation.en: O Allah! Make our scent pleasant, and increase our fragrance,

segments.arabic: وَ اَحْسِنْ مُنْقَلَبَنَا وَ اجْعَلِ التَّقْوٰى زَادَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa ahsin munqalabanaa waj a’lit taqwaa zaadanaa

translation.en: and make good the place of our return, and make piety our provision,

segments.arabic: وَ الْجَنَّةَ مَعَادَنَا وَ لَا تُفَرِّقْ بَيْنَنَا وَ بَيْنَ عَافِيَتِنَا اِيَّانَا
segments.transliteration: wal jannata ma-a’danaa wa laa tofarriq baynanaa wa bayna a’afeyatenaa iyyaanaa

translation.en: and paradise our final destination, and do not separate from us our well-being and

segments.arabic: وَ كَرَامَتِكَ لَنَا اِنَّكَ عَلٰى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa karaamateka lanaa innaka a’laa kulle shay-in qadeer.

translation.en: Your bounties, surely You have power over all things.

text.en: Sixty 60. His Daily Zikr

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَنَا مَا اَخْطَاْنَا
segments.transliteration: allaahummagh fir lanaa maa akhtaanaa

translation.en: O Allah! Forgive us for what we did by mistake

segments.arabic: وَ مَا تَعَمَّدْنَا وَ مَا اَسْرَرْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa maa ta-a’mmadnaa wa maa asrarnaa

translation.en: and what we did on purpose, and what we concealed

segments.arabic: وَ مَا اَنْتَ اَعْلَمُ بِهٖ مِنَّا اَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّمُ
segments.transliteration: wa maa anta a-a’lamo behi minnaa antal moqaddemo

translation.en: and what You know more of than us, You are the Foremost

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ الْمُؤَخِّرُ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اَنْت
segments.transliteration: wa antal mo-akhkhero laa elaaha illaa anta.

translation.en: and You are the Last, there is no god but You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوْبِ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma moqallebal qoloobe

translation.en: O Allah – the Transformer of hearts!

segments.arabic: ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِيْ عَلٰي دِيْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: sabbit qalbee a’laa deenaka.

translation.en: Make my heart steadfast on Your religion.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَهٗ مِنْهُ يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدَ بِحَمْدِهٖ
segments.transliteration: subhaanahu minho yosabbehur ra’da be-hamdehi.

translation.en: Praise be to Him – the thunder declares His glory

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَقْتُلْنَا بِغَضَبِكَ
segments.transliteration: allaahumma laa taqtulnaa be-ghazabeka

translation.en: O Allah! Do not kill us with Your wrath

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُهْلِكْنَا بِعَذَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa laa tohliknaa be-a’zaabeka

translation.en: and do not destroy us with Your punishment,

segments.arabic: وَ عَافِنَا قَبْلَ ذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa a’afenaa qabla zaaleka.

translation.en: and grant us amnesty before that.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنِّيْ اَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِيْه
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innee a-o’ozo beka min sharre maa feehe.

translation.en: O Allah! I seek Your protection from any evil that is in it.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ نَاشِئًا نَافِعًا
segments.transliteration: allaahumma naashe-an naafe-a’n.

translation.en: O Allah! Make it a beneficial cloud.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْهَا رِيَاحًا
segments.transliteration: allaahummaj a’lha reyaahan

translation.en: O Allah! Make it (from the other) winds

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَجْعَلْهَا رِيْحًا
segments.transliteration: wa laa taj-a’lhaa reehan

translation.en: and do not make it the destructive wind.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّكَ تَرٰى وَ لَا تُرٰى
segments.transliteration: allaahumma innaka taraa wa laa toraa

translation.en: O Allah! You see but cannot be seen

segments.arabic: وَ اَنْتَ بِالْمَنْظَرِ الْاَعْلٰى
segments.transliteration: wa anta bil-manzaril a-a’laa

translation.en: and You are at the highest viewpoint,

segments.arabic: وَ اَنَّ اِلَيْكَ الْمُنْتَهٰى وَ الرُّجْعٰى
segments.transliteration: wa annae laykal muntaha wa rukh-a

translation.en: and to You is the final destination and return,

segments.arabic: وَ اَنَّ لَكَ الْآخِرَةَ وَ الْاُوْلٰى
segments.transliteration: wa anna lakal aakherata wal oolaa

translation.en: and Yours are the end and the beginning

segments.arabic: وَ اَنَّ لَكَ الْمَمَاتَ وَ الْمَحْيَا رَبِّ
segments.transliteration: wa anna lakal mamaata wal mahyaa rabbe

translation.en: and Yours are the place of death and life. O Lord!

segments.arabic: اَعُوْذُ بِكَ اَناَذِلّ وَ اَخْزٰى
segments.transliteration: a-o’ozo beka an azilla wa akhzaa.

translation.en: I seek Your protection from being disrespected and disgraced.
